growth_orientation_rationale: The reforms provide essential financial support to startups and innovative firms, enhancing their capacity to invest in technology and innovation, which is expected to boost productivity and economic growth.
status_evidence: The programs have been established and are actively supporting startups and innovative firms.
importance_rationale: The establishment of significant funding programs for startups and innovation represents a structural change in the support system for entrepreneurship and technological advancement.
description: The Deutsche Ausgleichsbank has established programs to support the founding of small enterprises, including long-term capital provisions such as fixed-rate loans and equity-like loans without collateral. Additionally, the Kreditanstalt für Wiederaufbau has introduced an innovation loan program aimed at financing high-risk innovation investments to stimulate technological advancement for startups and innovative small and medium-sized firms.
source_quote: The Deutsche Ausgleichsbank is specialized in supporting the founding of small enterprises and the KfW in supporting venture capital companies as well as innovative small and medium-sized firms through its participation programme and its innovation loan programme.

growth_orientation_rationale: Enhancing government support for research and fostering cooperation between sectors is expected to lead to increased innovation and productivity.
status_evidence: The policy initiatives were initiated and are in force.
importance_rationale: The initiatives represent a significant but narrower change in public funding and support for R&D.
description: In 1995, the German government initiated a series of policy initiatives aimed at enhancing government support for research and improving cooperation between the public and private sectors, particularly focusing on small and medium-sized enterprises.
source_quote: In the area of science and technology, policy initiatives in 1995 have aimed to enhance government support for research and improve cooperation between the public and private sectors.

growth_orientation_rationale: Facilitating access to risk capital and enhancing technological know-how are expected to stimulate entrepreneurship and innovation, leading to economic growth.
status_evidence: The reform is planned and has been officially announced.
importance_rationale: The substantial revision of the labour code and the focus on risk capital access represent a significant structural change in support of startups.
description: The German government is planning a substantial revision of the labour code to promote active job search and improve labour-market performance, which includes measures to facilitate access to risk capital for small and medium-sized enterprises. Additionally, initiatives to enhance the creation and diffusion of technological know-how, including taxation and legal changes to foster venture capital markets, are emphasized to nurture an entrepreneurial climate.
source_quote: Taxation and legal changes need to be made in order to foster the development of venture capital markets.

growth_orientation_rationale: Enhancing industry contacts improves the commercialization of research outputs.
status_evidence: The steps have been actively taken to enhance research centre performance.
importance_rationale: Significant efforts to improve research centre performance, but not a major structural change.
description: The government has taken steps to improve the performance of its research centres by encouraging them to enhance contacts with industry and retain revenues from such activities.
source_quote: The government has taken steps to improve the performance of its research centres.

growth_orientation_rationale: Extending subsidies is intended to enhance infrastructure and industrial development, which can positively impact regional economic growth.
status_evidence: The subsidy programmes have been reviewed and are currently in effect until the end of 1998.
importance_rationale: The extension of subsidy programmes is significant for regional development but does not constitute a major reform.
description: The major subsidy programmes for eastern Germany have been reviewed and extended until the end of 1998, with the aim of further upgrading infrastructure and broadening the industrial base in the region.
source_quote: The major subsidy programmes for eastern Germany... were prolonged until the end of 1998 pending a final review.

growth_orientation_rationale: Supporting start-ups fosters innovation and economic growth.
status_evidence: The programmes have been put into action to support start-ups.
importance_rationale: Significant funding and support for start-ups, but not a structural overhaul.
description: The government has implemented several programmes to support new high technology start-ups through seed capital and subsidised loan programmes, with DM 13 billion allocated for 1998 and 1999 to assist approximately 30,000 start-ups, including guarantees for equity participation financed by development banks.
source_quote: The federal government has introduced subsidised loan programmes through one of the public banks... DM 13 billion has been made available in both 1998 and 1999.

growth_orientation_rationale: Streamlining processes and improving access to finance enhances innovation and economic activity.
component_name: Approval Process and Financial Market Reforms
status_evidence: The reforms have been enacted to support innovation and entrepreneurship.
importance_rationale: Significant reforms to support innovation, but not a complete overhaul of the system.
description: The German government has initiated reforms to streamline the approval process for opening plants and workshops, created a new lending programme with favourable terms to finance job creation projects, and deepened financial markets to foster venture capital, improving access to equity capital for companies.
source_quote: A new lending programme with favourable terms has been created by the federal government to help finance the materials and capital costs of job creation projects.

growth_orientation_rationale: Increasing participation in labour market programmes enhances the skills and employability of the workforce.
component_name: Expansion of Active Labour Market Programmes
status_evidence: The programme expansion has been actively implemented.
importance_rationale: Significant increase in funding and participation, but not a major structural change.
description: The government aims to increase participation in active labour market programmes by 200,000 persons, with a budget increase of DM 5 billion to DM 40 billion.
source_quote: Active labour market schemes are being expanded again in 1998, the government aiming for participation in the programmes to increase by some 200,000 persons.

growth_orientation_rationale: Facilitating quicker re-entry into business supports entrepreneurial activity.
status_evidence: The introduction of the new bankruptcy code has been officially announced.
importance_rationale: Significant reform to support entrepreneurship, but not a major structural change.
description: A new bankruptcy code is set to be introduced in 1999, broadening the grounds for filing bankruptcy claims and allowing directors to re-enter economic life more quickly, which aims to support entrepreneurship.
source_quote: A new code is to be introduced at the beginning of 1999 which will define the grounds for filing bankruptcy claims in broader terms than in the past.

growth_orientation_rationale: Enhancing vocational training opportunities for youth is expected to improve their employability and contribute to the labor market.
status_evidence: The scheme was introduced and is currently in operation.
importance_rationale: The reform significantly expands training opportunities but does not represent a structural change.
description: A new public support scheme was introduced in January 1999 to provide an additional 100,000 training places for unemployed youth, aiming to enhance their vocational training opportunities within enterprises.
source_quote: A new public support scheme came into operation in January 1999, which aims at making available an additional 100,000 places in training programmes or work provision schemes with training content.

growth_orientation_rationale: These reforms are designed to enhance access to equity capital for companies and promote energy efficiency, which can stimulate economic growth.
status_evidence: Both reforms were enacted and are currently in effect.
importance_rationale: The reforms represent significant changes in market regulations and taxation that can have widespread economic impacts.
description: Germany implemented laws to improve flexibility in financial markets and an ecological tax reform in April 1999, which raised taxes on gasoline, diesel, and electricity to promote energy efficiency and reduce greenhouse gas emissions.
source_quote: The reform, which came into force in April 1999, raised the gasoline and diesel tax slightly by 6 pfennigs per litre.

growth_orientation_rationale: Facilitating the establishment of new businesses is expected to foster innovation and economic growth.
status_evidence: The allowance was introduced and is currently in effect.
importance_rationale: The reform provides significant support for startups but does not represent a systemic overhaul.
description: Germany introduced an accelerated depreciation allowance for newly-founded enterprises, aimed at facilitating the establishment of new businesses.
source_quote: Accelerated depreciation allowance for newly-founded enterprises; wage subsidies for small new-founded firms.

growth_orientation_rationale: Funding for research and development in alternative energy sources is expected to drive innovation and contribute to environmental sustainability.
status_evidence: The programme was launched and is currently operational.
importance_rationale: The programme represents a comprehensive approach to climate change and energy transition.
description: Germany's climate protection programme includes over 130 measures aimed at reducing carbon dioxide emissions, which involve subsidies for alternative energy sources and funding for research and development.
source_quote: The Federal government’s climate protection programme contains over 130 measures for reducing emissions of carbon dioxide and other greenhouse gases, including actions aimed at the sequestration of carbon in forests.

growth_orientation_rationale: The programme aims to improve fiscal health, which can lead to a more stable economic environment conducive to growth.
status_evidence: The reform has been proposed but not yet implemented.
importance_rationale: This reform represents a structural change in fiscal policy aimed at long-term economic stability.
description: The government proposed a medium-term programme to reduce the budget deficit and lower public expenditures to pre-unification levels in relation to GDP by the year 2000, aiming for a significant fiscal consolidation.
source_quote: The government has proposed a medium-term programme to reduce the budget deficit and lower public expenditures to pre-unification levels in relation to GDP by the year 2000.

growth_orientation_rationale: By addressing the shortage of IT professionals, this reform aims to enhance productivity and economic growth.
component_name: Relaxation of Immigration Laws for IT Professionals
status_evidence: The reform has been enacted and is currently in effect.
importance_rationale: This reform is significant in addressing a critical skills gap but does not represent a fundamental overhaul.
description: The Federal Government relaxed immigration laws and started issuing working permits for foreign computer experts to address the shortage of IT professionals, which was perceived to slow down economic activity and employment growth.
source_quote: In autumn 2000 the Federal Government relaxed immigration laws and started issuing working permits ('green cards') for foreign computer experts.

growth_orientation_rationale: The allowance incentivizes investment in new enterprises, promoting economic growth.
status_evidence: The reform has been put into effect as of 2001.
importance_rationale: While beneficial, the reform is a minor adjustment rather than a structural change.
description: Germany implemented an accelerated depreciation allowance for newly-founded enterprises to facilitate their establishment and growth.
source_quote: Accelerated depreciation allowance for newly-founded enterprises.

growth_orientation_rationale: The allocation of funds and establishment of support programmes are designed to enhance R&D and investment, which are critical for economic growth.
component_name: UMTS License Savings Allocation and Support Programmes
status_evidence: The reforms have been enacted and are currently in effect.
importance_rationale: This reform represents a significant structural change in funding allocation for R&D and support for private enterprises.
description: The government plans to allocate a significant portion of the interest savings from the UMTS license sales towards projects crucial for maintaining and enhancing the economy's growth potential, specifically in infrastructure, education, and R&D. Additionally, the Federal and state governments established several support programmes for private enterprises in the new Länder, aimed at fostering investment, business start-ups, research and development, and exports.
source_quote: To foster the reconstruction of the eastern German economy, beginning in 1990 the Federal Government and the governments of the new states as well as state-owned banks and the EU set up several support programmes for private enterprises, designed to foster investment, business start-ups, research and development, and exports.

growth_orientation_rationale: These reforms aim to enhance the quality of education and vocational training, which are essential for building a skilled workforce.
status_evidence: The reforms have been proposed and are pending implementation.
importance_rationale: The proposed reforms represent a significant structural change in the education system.
description: The Federal Government plans to allocate 5% of the funds from a special scheme for reducing youth unemployment to additional mobility grants for apprentices seeking vocational training away from home. Additionally, the German Monopolies Commission proposed fundamental reforms to public universities, advocating for greater independence in introducing tuition fees and performance-based salary schemes for university teachers to improve education quality.
source_quote: The Federal Government plans to spend 5 per cent of the funds allocated to the special scheme for the reduction of youth unemployment on additional mobility grants to apprentices who want to take up vocational training in enterprises away from home.

growth_orientation_rationale: The DMP aims to improve healthcare outcomes, which can lead to increased productivity and reduced healthcare costs.
status_evidence: The DMP has been fully operational since its introduction.
importance_rationale: The introduction of DMP represents a significant policy change in healthcare management.
description: In 2002, Germany introduced disease management programs (DMP) aimed at improving chronic disease care by establishing care standards and encouraging better integration of care for chronically ill patients.
source_quote: A major reform effort was the introduction of so-called disease management programs (DMP) for chronic disease care in 2002.

growth_orientation_rationale: These measures enhance the availability of funding for innovative startups, which can drive economic growth and innovation.
status_evidence: The measures have been fully operational since their introduction.
importance_rationale: The comprehensive support for startups and venture capital represents a major shift in policy to stimulate innovation.
description: Germany has implemented measures to foster venture capital, reduce regulatory barriers, and provide public financial support for high technology-oriented SMEs, including accelerated depreciation allowances for newly-founded enterprises and the 'Venture Capital for small technology companies' (BTU) programme.
source_quote: The main federal government programme to promote venture capital for particularly high technology orientated small and medium-sized enterprises (SMEs) is entitled 'Venture Capital for small technology companies' or BTU.

growth_orientation_rationale: By encouraging entrepreneurship, the scheme aims to reduce unemployment and stimulate economic activity through new business creation.
status_evidence: The Ich AG scheme accounted for a substantial proportion of newly founded firms in 2003.
importance_rationale: The scheme represents a significant policy initiative aimed at fostering entrepreneurship among the unemployed, with potential long-term impacts on job creation.
description: The Ich AG scheme was introduced to provide subsidies to unemployed individuals who decide to start their own businesses, aiming to increase entrepreneurship among the unemployed.
source_quote: A new ALMP, paying subsidies to the unemployed who decide to set up their own business (Ich AG), has been introduced on a large scale.

growth_orientation_rationale: By aligning tax treatment, the reform incentivizes venture capitalists to invest in start-ups, potentially increasing innovation and economic growth.
component_name: Tax Incentive Adjustment for VC Managers
status_evidence: The legislation came into force in July 2004.
importance_rationale: This reform addresses a significant barrier to venture capital investment in start-ups, which is crucial for fostering innovation and entrepreneurship.
description: New legislation effective from July 2004 reduces the tax disparity between performance incentives for venture capital managers and those in large established firms, aiming to encourage investment in start-ups.
source_quote: New legislation, effective from July 2004 onwards, reduces this difference in tax treatment of performance incentives between managers of venture capital firms and managers of large established firms.

growth_orientation_rationale: These measures are expected to enhance the capacity for innovation, leading to higher productivity and economic growth.
status_evidence: Measures to improve the framework conditions for innovation are being implemented.
importance_rationale: This reform represents a significant shift in policy aimed at enhancing innovation capacity, which is crucial for long-term economic growth.
description: Germany is implementing measures to improve the framework conditions for innovation, including removing disincentives for risk-taking and capital provision to new firms, and enhancing the efficiency of the higher education sector.
source_quote: Measures to improve the framework conditions for innovation should include removing disincentives to take risks and to provide capital to new firms.

growth_orientation_rationale: By reducing pharmaceutical costs and improving efficiency, the reform is expected to enhance the overall productivity of the health care system, which can positively impact economic growth.
status_evidence: The reform came into effect in January 2004.
importance_rationale: This reform represents a significant overhaul of the health care financing system, aiming to improve efficiency and reduce costs, which are critical for the sustainability of public health care in Germany.
description: The government introduced a reform of the publicly financed health care system in January 2004, aiming to reduce costs and improve efficiency in health care provision by extending the reference price system to some patented medicines.
source_quote: The government introduced a reform of the publicly financed health care system, which came into effect in January 2004, aiming to reduce costs as well as improve efficiency of publicly financed health care provision.

growth_orientation_rationale: By reducing entry barriers, the reform encourages new business formation, which can enhance competition and innovation in the handicrafts sector.
status_evidence: The reform has been in force since the beginning of 2004.
importance_rationale: This reform represents a significant structural change in the handicrafts sector, facilitating entrepreneurship and potentially leading to increased innovation and economic activity.
description: The German government has reformed handicrafts regulation by removing the master certificate requirement for 53 out of 94 craft trades, significantly lowering entry barriers for new businesses in the sector.
source_quote: As a result of the reform, in force since the beginning of 2004, 53 out of 94 craft trades cease to be subject to entry requirements.

growth_orientation_rationale: Improving competition in telecommunications can lead to better services and lower prices, fostering innovation and productivity growth in the economy.
status_evidence: The new law addresses issues that have hampered competition in the sector.
importance_rationale: This reform is a significant step towards enhancing competition in a critical sector, which is essential for overall economic performance and innovation.
description: A new law on telecoms regulation has been introduced to clarify rules on abusive market behavior and streamline regulatory procedures, aimed at enhancing competition in the telecommunications sector.
source_quote: A new law on telecoms regulation addresses some issues which have thus far hampered competition in the sector.

growth_orientation_rationale: By reducing administrative burdens, the reform encourages the creation of new firms, which can enhance innovation and economic dynamism.
status_evidence: The government has taken steps to ease burdens on start-ups.
importance_rationale: This reform represents a significant change in the regulatory environment for start-ups, which can lead to increased entrepreneurial activity and innovation.
description: The government eased administrative burdens on firms and employment protection legislation for start-ups, raising the threshold for the application of dismissal legislation.
source_quote: Eased administrative burdens on firms and employment protection legislation for start-ups.

growth_orientation_rationale: Facilitating the immigration of qualified workers can enhance the skill level of the workforce, thereby supporting innovation and productivity growth.
status_evidence: New immigration legislation has been adopted.
importance_rationale: This reform is significant as it addresses the need for skilled labor in the economy, which is crucial for fostering innovation.
description: New immigration legislation was adopted to introduce qualification standards for immigrants, aimed at facilitating the immigration of qualified workers.
source_quote: New immigration legislation to introduce qualification standards for immigrants has been adopted.

growth_orientation_rationale: Reducing subsidies may lead to short-term economic challenges in the coal sector, potentially impacting employment and investment.
status_evidence: The proposal has been officially legislated but not yet implemented.
importance_rationale: The reform represents a significant policy change in subsidy allocation but is not a structural overhaul.
description: The government has proposed a gradual reduction in subsidies to the coal industry, with a plan to decrease federal subsidies from DM 8 billion in 1997 to DM 3.8 billion by 2005, aiming to reduce reliance on state support.
source_quote: The government proposed a gradual reduction in subsidies to the coal industry, but in the face of industrial action and protests by affected Länder, the proposal was diluted.

growth_orientation_rationale: PPPs are expected to leverage private sector efficiency and innovation in infrastructure projects, potentially leading to better service delivery and cost savings for the government.
status_evidence: Legislation which came into force in mid-2005 removed regulatory obstacles for PPPs.
importance_rationale: The reform represents a significant shift in how infrastructure projects are financed, aiming to improve efficiency and service delivery through private sector involvement.
description: Germany is aiming to enhance the utilization of public-private partnerships (PPPs) for infrastructure financing, following the removal of regulatory obstacles that previously hindered private investment in this area.
source_quote: Public sector authorities in Germany are aiming at greater utilisation of public-private sector partnerships (PPPs) to finance infrastructure, based on the evaluation of costs and benefits over the life cycle of investment projects.

growth_orientation_rationale: Increased spending on innovation is expected to enhance productivity and stimulate economic growth.
status_evidence: The package includes measures to increase spending on innovation.
importance_rationale: This reform represents a significant commitment to enhancing innovation funding, which is crucial for long-term economic growth and competitiveness.
description: The government plans to phase in fiscal measures to raise medium-term growth and stimulate the economy, which includes higher spending on innovation and infrastructure.
source_quote: This package foresees inter alia higher spending on innovation and infrastructure.

growth_orientation_rationale: By streamlining innovation funding and removing ineffective subsidies, the reform is expected to improve resource allocation and enhance the overall effectiveness of public research investments.
status_evidence: The government has committed to a timetable and the elimination of ineffective subsidies.
importance_rationale: This reform represents a significant structural change in how innovation funding is managed, aiming to enhance the effectiveness of public investment in research and development.
description: The government established a timetable for all government-funded innovation programmes and committed to eliminating ineffective subsidies, aiming to enhance the efficiency of public research funding.
source_quote: Establish timetable for all government-funded innovation programmes and eliminate ineffective subsidies.

growth_orientation_rationale: By incentivizing high-quality research and teaching, the initiative aims to enhance the overall educational and research output of universities, contributing to long-term economic growth.
status_evidence: The programme has been launched and is operational.
importance_rationale: This initiative represents a significant structural change in how funding is allocated to universities, focusing on quality and performance, which is crucial for enhancing the education system's effectiveness.
description: The 'Exzellenzinitiative' is a new programme co-funded by the federal government and states, aimed at improving performance incentives for universities by tendering funds for high-quality postgraduate teaching schools and research projects.
source_quote: A new programme ('Exzellenzinitiative') co-funded by the federal government and the states, foresees the tendering of funds for the highest-quality post-graduate teaching schools and research projects submitted by universities.

growth_orientation_rationale: While it may incentivize some parents to remain in the labor force, it could also discourage highly qualified individuals from working due to the high income replacement rate.
status_evidence: The government plans to introduce a new income replacement scheme.
importance_rationale: This reform represents a significant change in family support policy, aiming to improve labor supply incentives for parents, particularly mothers.
description: The German government plans to introduce a new income replacement scheme (Elterngeld) that will replace the existing Erziehungsgeld, providing two-thirds of earnings foregone due to reductions in labor supply after childbirth for a year.
source_quote: The government plans to introduce a new income replacement scheme (Elterngeld) that replaces over one year two thirds of earnings foregone due to reductions in labour supply after childbirth.

growth_orientation_rationale: By providing financial support for entrepreneurship, the scheme encourages the creation of new businesses, which can lead to job creation and economic growth.
status_evidence: The scheme was associated with very high take-up rates among unemployed individuals.
importance_rationale: The introduction of the Ich-AG scheme represents a significant policy shift towards supporting entrepreneurship among the unemployed, with potential long-term benefits for the economy.
description: The Ich-AG support scheme was introduced to provide unconditional subsidies to unemployed individuals who decide to start their own businesses, although it has since been modified to require a business plan for eligibility.
source_quote: The Ich-AG support scheme granted unconditional subsidies to the unemployed who decide to set up their own business.

growth_orientation_rationale: Increased R&D spending is expected to enhance innovation capacity, leading to higher productivity and economic growth.
status_evidence: The government has phased in fiscal measures including increased R&D spending.
importance_rationale: This reform represents a significant commitment to enhancing R&D funding, which is crucial for long-term economic growth and competitiveness.
description: The new government has increased government R&D spending as part of a broader fiscal strategy to stimulate the economy and improve growth prospects.
source_quote: The package comprises...increases in government R&D spending as well as in transport infrastructure.

growth_orientation_rationale: Increased R&D funding is expected to foster innovation and improve productivity, contributing positively to economic growth.
status_evidence: The government plans to increase R&D spending as part of its fiscal strategy.
importance_rationale: The increase in R&D spending is a significant step towards enhancing innovation capacity, although it is part of a broader fiscal strategy.
description: The government plans to increase R&D spending to enhance long-term growth prospects, aiming to stimulate investment and innovation.
source_quote: some of the measures –such as the increase in government R&D spending– also aim at raising longer term growth prospects.

growth_orientation_rationale: The investment in R&D is expected to enhance innovation capacity and competitiveness in key sectors, thereby supporting economic growth.
status_evidence: The strategy was launched with a clear investment plan.
importance_rationale: This comprehensive initiative represents a significant structural change in Germany's approach to R&D funding, aiming to enhance innovation across multiple sectors.
description: The German government launched the High-Tech Strategy in 2006, aiming to stimulate private R&D investment by investing EUR14.6 billion over four years to support R&D activities across designated sectors and improve conditions for innovative SMEs.
source_quote: In 2006 the German government launched the High-Tech Strategy as a comprehensive initiative, encompassing all ministries, to stimulate private R&D investment.

growth_orientation_rationale: By facilitating the employment of older workers, the initiative enhances labor market participation and utilizes the skills of an experienced workforce, contributing positively to economic growth.
status_evidence: The initiative has been actively supporting older workers since its launch.
importance_rationale: The initiative represents a significant policy change aimed at addressing demographic challenges in the labor market.
description: The German government has introduced the 'Initiative 50plus' to support the employment of older workers, which includes wage subsidies for employers hiring individuals aged 50 and above, as well as a subsidy for companies that employ older workers to increase their employment rates and facilitate their integration into the labor market.
source_quote: The government has launched a series of measures called the 'Initiative 50plus'... including wage subsidies amounting to between 30% and 50% of the wages paid for up to 36 months.

growth_orientation_rationale: By enhancing cost-effectiveness in the pharmaceutical market, the reform supports better allocation of resources and innovation in healthcare.
status_evidence: The IQWiG has been actively conducting cost-benefit analyses since the extension.
importance_rationale: The extension of the IQWiG's remit represents a significant policy change in the evaluation of pharmaceuticals.
description: The government has extended the remit of the IQWiG to include cost-benefit analysis for patented medicines, aiming to determine maximum reimbursement prices and enhance cost-effectiveness in the pharmaceutical market.
source_quote: The government has extended the remit of the IQWiG from performing benefit analysis for new medicines to cost-benefit analysis.

growth_orientation_rationale: By increasing funding for universities, this reform aims to enhance the quality of education and align it more closely with labor market needs, thereby supporting economic growth.
status_evidence: 5 of 16 states are planning to introduce student fees amounting up to €1000 per year of study by 2008.
importance_rationale: While significant, the introduction of student fees is a narrower reform focused on funding rather than a comprehensive overhaul of the education system.
description: The introduction of student fees for tertiary education, coupled with a loan scheme and income-contingent repayments, aims to provide additional financial resources to universities while ensuring that students can defer payments until after graduation.
source_quote: 5 of 16 states are planning to introduce student fees amounting up to €1000 per year of study by 2008.

growth_orientation_rationale: Improving access to higher education enhances the skill level of the workforce, which is essential for innovation and economic growth.
status_evidence: The programs are currently in operation and funded.
importance_rationale: The funding initiative represents a significant effort to address educational disparities.
description: The federal government, in collaboration with the Länder, is financing various programs to improve access to university studies for individuals from less favorable socio-economic backgrounds, including increased funding under the Federal Education and Training Assistance Act (BAföG).
source_quote: The recent amendment Act increases the amount of individual support significantly (10% or more) from autumn 2008 and will also increase the number of students supported.

growth_orientation_rationale: By enhancing the venture capital framework, the reform aims to facilitate funding for startups, thereby promoting innovation and economic growth.
status_evidence: The Act was adopted to modernize venture capital conditions.
importance_rationale: This reform is significant as it addresses the critical issue of venture capital availability for innovative firms, although it is part of a broader strategy.
description: The Act on the Modernisation of Framework Conditions for Venture Capital and Equity Investments was adopted in 2008 to improve the venture capital market, which is crucial for supporting innovative and entrepreneurial firms.
source_quote: The Act on the Modernisation of Framework Conditions for Venture Capital and Equity Investments (MoRaKG), adopted in 2008, was an important step in the right direction.

growth_orientation_rationale: These measures aim to enhance the skills of the workforce, thereby improving productivity and addressing skill shortages in the economy.
status_evidence: The government has recently launched a set of programmes to financially support adult education.
importance_rationale: This initiative represents a significant effort to improve adult education access and participation, which is crucial for addressing skill gaps in the labor market.
description: The German government has launched a set of programmes to financially support adult education, including education vouchers for low-income individuals and access to special savings accounts for learning activities.
source_quote: The government has recently launched a set of programmes to financially support adult education.

growth_orientation_rationale: The subsidies for R&D investment are expected to enhance innovation capacity among SMEs, leading to increased productivity and economic growth.
status_evidence: The stimulus packages were enacted to counteract the economic downturn.
importance_rationale: The stimulus packages represent a significant intervention in the economy aimed at revitalizing growth and supporting innovation during a crisis.
description: The German government launched two stimulus packages in response to the economic crisis, which included measures to boost public investment and support R&D investment by SMEs.
source_quote: The government launched two stimulus packages... including a subsidy for R&D investment by SMEs.

growth_orientation_rationale: Increased public funding for R&D is expected to stimulate innovation and productivity growth, contributing to higher economic growth.
status_evidence: The government plans to increase public spending on innovation.
importance_rationale: This reform represents a significant increase in public investment in R&D, which is crucial for enhancing Germany's innovation capacity and overall economic performance.
description: The German government plans to increase public spending on innovation from 0.8% of GDP in 2002 to 1% by 2010, aiming to enhance the capacity for research and development.
source_quote: The German government plans to increase public spending from 0.8% of GDP in 2002 to 1% by 2010.

growth_orientation_rationale: Improving access to education and integrating skilled migrants enhances the talent pool, which is crucial for innovation.
status_evidence: The measures have been put into effect.
importance_rationale: The reforms significantly improve human capital but do not represent a complete overhaul of the system.
description: Germany has implemented measures to improve the accessibility of tertiary education, including increased autonomy for universities to select students and introduce tuition fees, along with financial support for low-income students. Additionally, the 'Recognition Act' facilitates the integration of skilled migrants into the labor market by granting them the legal right to receive an official evaluation of their foreign qualifications.
source_quote: Germany has implemented measures facilitating access to university for students with low social background, such as the provision of loans to finance tuition fees.

growth_orientation_rationale: Investing in energy research and infrastructure is expected to enhance innovation in the energy sector and support the transition to renewable energy.
component_name: Electricity Network Improvement and Energy Research Funding
status_evidence: The investment and funding have been executed.
importance_rationale: The significant funding and infrastructure improvements represent a major reform in energy research.
description: Germany is investing in the expansion and improvement of electricity transmission and distribution networks to accommodate renewable energy sources, which is crucial for integrating decentralized energy production. This investment is part of the 6th Energy Research Programme, which allocates EUR 3.5 billion for energy research from 2011 to 2014, marking a 75% increase compared to previous funding periods.
source_quote: The Cabinet recently adopted the 6th Energy Research Programme providing EUR 3.5 billion for energy research on the period 2011-14, a 75% increase compared to 2006-09.

growth_orientation_rationale: The reform encourages entrepreneurship and innovation by allowing failed entrepreneurs to start anew, which can lead to increased economic activity and job creation.
status_evidence: The reform has been enacted and is currently in force.
importance_rationale: The reform significantly impacts the startup ecosystem by improving conditions for entrepreneurs, though it is not a structural overhaul.
description: Germany has reformed its bankruptcy legislation to reduce the stay period for bankrupt entrepreneurs to facilitate a fresh start, thereby encouraging the reallocation of resources and fostering innovative startups.
source_quote: Reform of bankruptcy legislation, most recently in 2012, reduced the stay period after which bankrupt entrepreneurs are cleared from remaining debt.

growth_orientation_rationale: The reform enhances the investment environment for venture capital, which is crucial for fostering innovation and entrepreneurship.
status_evidence: The investment grant for Business Angels was introduced and is currently in effect.
importance_rationale: The reform significantly improves the conditions for venture capital investment, which is important for innovation but does not constitute a major overhaul.
description: Germany improved the framework conditions for innovation by ensuring sufficient exit possibilities for venture capitalists and enhancing transparency through unified supervision of venture capital and capital investment companies. An investment grant for Business Angels was introduced in May 2013.
source_quote: In May 2013, Germany introduced an investment grant for Business Angels (Investitionszuschuss Wagniskapital).

growth_orientation_rationale: Funding targeted at public health research can lead to innovations that improve health outcomes and reduce healthcare costs, contributing to economic growth.
status_evidence: The funding programme has been operational since 2013.
importance_rationale: The funding addresses specific research needs in public health, which is significant but not a comprehensive reform of the R&D funding landscape.
description: The German government provides up to EUR 125 million for research and development projects focused on prevention and diet from 2013 to 2016, addressing major research gaps in public health.
source_quote: The government provides up to EUR 125 million for research-and-development projects in the period from 2013 to 2016.

growth_orientation_rationale: Investing in broadband infrastructure enhances connectivity, which is essential for innovation and economic development, particularly in rural areas.
status_evidence: The fund has been established and is currently operational.

source_quote: The federal government plans to spend EUR 2.7 billion (0.1% of annual GDP) over three years to subsidise broadband deployment in order to ensure broadband speeds of 50 Mbit per second.

growth_orientation_rationale: Improving procurement efficiency can lead to better allocation of resources and stimulate innovation in the public sector.
status_evidence: The reform has been officially announced but is not yet implemented.

source_quote: The government’s plans to implement a comprehensive e-procurement system... are welcome.

growth_orientation_rationale: These reforms reduce financial risks and administrative burdens for entrepreneurs, thereby promoting business creation and growth.
status_evidence: The reforms have been enacted and are currently in effect.
importance_rationale: The reforms represent significant changes in the legal framework supporting entrepreneurship.
description: The German government has implemented reforms to encourage entrepreneurship by reducing the discharge period for bankrupt entrepreneurs from six years to three years, provided they repay a portion of their debt. Additionally, to facilitate start-ups, the government plans to introduce a 'One-Stop-Shop' and a VAT exemption for the first years after starting a business. A legislation expanding the options for carrying forward tax losses was also adopted in 2016, aimed at facilitating the financial management of start-ups.
source_quote: To facilitate start-ups, the government plans to introduce a 'One-Stop-Shop' and a VAT exemption for the first years after starting a business.

growth_orientation_rationale: Facilitating access to public markets for high-growth firms is expected to enhance their growth potential and attract investment.
status_evidence: The new market segment has been established and is operational.
importance_rationale: While significant, this reform is more of an adjustment to existing market structures rather than a major overhaul.

source_quote: A new market segment in Deutsche Börse for young high growth firms ('Scale') was launched in 2017.

growth_orientation_rationale: Enhances the skill set of the workforce, thereby increasing productivity and adaptability in a changing job market.
status_evidence: The Act has been in effect since 2019, expanding training opportunities.
importance_rationale: The reform significantly enhances training opportunities for a broad segment of the workforce, addressing skill shortages and promoting lifelong learning.
description: The Act on Opportunities to Gain Qualifications, effective since 2019, has expanded training opportunities for individuals affected by structural change, allowing employers to receive wage subsidies for skill development programs.
source_quote: The Act on Opportunities to Gain Qualifications, in effect since 2019, has expanded training opportunities for individuals independent of age, qualification and firm size.

growth_orientation_rationale: The auction promotes competition among mobile operators, which can lead to better services and innovation in mobile technology.

importance_rationale: While significant, the auction is a specific measure within a broader strategy to enhance mobile network competition and infrastructure.
description: The 2019 auction of spectrum in the 2 GHz and 3.6 GHz bands is designed to facilitate 5G deployment and improve mobile network competition in Germany.
source_quote: The 2019 auction of spectrum in the 2 Gigahertz (GHz) and 3.6 GHz bands paved the way for 5G deployment in the country.

growth_orientation_rationale: By subsidizing ICT investments, the programme enhances SMEs' capabilities, fostering innovation and productivity.
status_evidence: The programme was launched to support SMEs in their digital transformation efforts.

source_quote: The recently launched Digital Jetzt (Digital Now) programme subsidises investments in ICTs, including software and related training in firms with 3-499 employees.

growth_orientation_rationale: By enhancing awareness and providing expertise, the strategy supports SMEs in adopting digital technologies, which can lead to increased productivity.

source_quote: The government’s 2019 Mittelstand-Digital strategy raises awareness and provides guidance on digital transformation for SMEs.

growth_orientation_rationale: By increasing the number of STEM graduates, the plan aims to enhance the skilled workforce necessary for innovation and technological advancement.

importance_rationale: The plan represents a significant effort to address skills shortages in STEM fields, which are critical for innovation and economic growth.

source_quote: The STEM Action Plan, introduced in 2019, aims to raise enthusiasm to take up STEM education and careers.

growth_orientation_rationale: Increased public and private investment in infrastructure is expected to enhance productivity and support economic recovery.
status_evidence: The government is actively increasing public investment as part of its recovery efforts.
importance_rationale: This reform represents a significant structural change in public investment strategy, addressing long-standing infrastructure deficits and aiming to stimulate economic growth.
description: Germany is boosting public investment and incentives for private investment through a recovery package that sets aside EUR 50 billion, aimed at addressing the public investment backlog and enhancing infrastructure capacity.
source_quote: The government is boosting public investment and incentives for private investment through setting aside EUR 50 billion as part of its recovery package.

growth_orientation_rationale: Accelerating digital transformation is expected to improve productivity and economic resilience, particularly in response to the challenges posed by the COVID-19 crisis.
status_evidence: The need for digital transformation has been recognized and prioritized in response to the COVID-19 crisis.
importance_rationale: This initiative represents a critical shift towards enhancing digital infrastructure and capabilities, which are essential for future economic growth and resilience.
description: The COVID-19 crisis has highlighted the need for Germany to accelerate its digital transformation, with a focus on enhancing fixed and mobile communication network coverage and quality.
source_quote: Digital transformation should be accelerated through enhancing fixed and mobile communication network coverage and quality.

growth_orientation_rationale: Increased public investment in R&D and digitalisation is expected to enhance productivity and innovation capacity, driving long-term economic growth.
component_name: Investment in Digital Transformation and Green Energy
status_evidence: The government plans to bring forward public investment in various sectors as part of the recovery package.
importance_rationale: This reform represents a significant shift in public investment strategy aimed at addressing long-term challenges and fostering innovation across multiple sectors.
description: The German government plans to increase investments in digital transformation, education, health, and green energy as part of a recovery package, which includes direct subsidies for research on digitalisation and energy transition technologies.
source_quote: About EUR 50 billion seeks to respond to long-term challenges through public and private investment in the domains of digital transformation, education, health and green energy.

growth_orientation_rationale: Enhancing R&D tax incentives is expected to encourage firms to invest more in innovation, leading to higher productivity and economic growth.
status_evidence: The recovery package includes measures to support R&D and accelerate digital transformation.

source_quote: Increased R&D tax incentives and direct subsidies for research on digitalisation, e-mobility and energy transition including hydrogen technologies.

growth_orientation_rationale: Investing in charging infrastructure supports the transition to electric vehicles, which can enhance productivity and reduce emissions.
status_evidence: Funding for charging station infrastructure was expanded as part of the recovery package.
importance_rationale: The expansion of funding for charging infrastructure is significant for promoting electric vehicle adoption and reducing emissions, contributing to broader climate goals.
description: The Climate Action Programme 2030 expanded federal funding programmes for charging station infrastructure on a large scale and additional funding was announced in the June 2020 recovery package.
source_quote: The Climate Action Programme 2030 expanded federal funding programmes for charging station infrastructure on a large scale.

growth_orientation_rationale: This support aims to foster innovation and job creation in regions transitioning away from coal, which can enhance local economies and reduce inequalities.
component_name: Support for Innovation and Job Markets
status_evidence: The government announced substantial financial support for coal mining regions.
importance_rationale: The EUR 40 billion support package is significant for addressing the economic impacts of transitioning from coal, promoting innovation and job creation in affected regions.
description: The federal government has announced EUR 40 billion in support for coal mining regions until 2038, focusing on supporting infrastructure, innovation, and job markets.
source_quote: The federal government has announced EUR 40 billion in support for coal mining regions until 2038, focusing on supporting infrastructure, innovation, and job markets.

growth_orientation_rationale: Increases the skill level of the workforce, which is essential for adapting to technological advancements and ensuring economic resilience.
status_evidence: The law was implemented in 2020 to strengthen training further in view of ongoing structural change.
importance_rationale: The reform addresses critical skill gaps in the workforce, promoting adaptability to future job market demands.
description: The 'Arbeit-von-morgen-Gesetz' implemented in 2020 aims to strengthen training in response to structural changes due to digitalisation and climate change, increasing support rates for firms providing training.
source_quote: In 2020, the 'Arbeit-von-morgen-Gesetz' was implemented to strengthen training further in view of ongoing structural change related to digitalisation and climate change.

growth_orientation_rationale: Improving mobile infrastructure is essential for enhancing connectivity, which supports digital transformation and innovation across sectors.
status_evidence: Contracts signed with mobile network operators aim for ambitious coverage targets.
importance_rationale: This reform represents a significant investment in national infrastructure that is crucial for future economic growth and competitiveness in the digital age.
description: Germany's national mobile strategy aims to achieve 99% LTE coverage for all households by the end of 2020 and to enhance 5G infrastructure with an additional EUR 5 billion investment post-COVID-19.
source_quote: The German mobile strategy aims at closing gaps in the LTE network and making Germany a leading country in fifth generation cellular networks (5G).

growth_orientation_rationale: The tax incentives are designed to stimulate R&D investment among firms, particularly benefiting SMEs, which can enhance innovation and productivity.

importance_rationale: This reform represents a significant structural change in the support for business R&D, aiming to enhance innovation capacity across the economy.
description: Germany introduced R&D tax incentives in early 2020, subsidising 25% of maximum EUR 2 million R&D expenditures per year, with an increased cap of EUR 4 million per firm until the end of 2025 as part of the COVID-19 recovery package.
source_quote: Germany introduced R&D tax incentives in early 2020, subsidising 25% of maximum EUR 2 million R&D expenditures per year.

growth_orientation_rationale: By enhancing adult education and training, the act aims to improve the skills of the workforce, thereby supporting innovation and productivity.

description: The Work of Tomorrow Act, from 2020, aims to facilitate adult learning through increased financial support and decreased bureaucratic efforts for employers and employees.
source_quote: The Work of Tomorrow Act (Arbeit-von-Morgen-Gesetz), from 2020, aims to facilitate adult learning through increased financial support.

growth_orientation_rationale: Streamlining administrative processes through digitalization is expected to lower barriers for entrepreneurs and improve efficiency.

description: The German government has initiated a reform to enhance e-government services, mandating that all administrative services be available online within five years, which aims to simplify the process of starting a business and reduce administrative burdens.
source_quote: The Online Access Improvement Act stipulated that the central and local governments must offer their administrative services online within five years.

growth_orientation_rationale: By providing financial support to SMEs and start-ups, the mFund aims to foster innovation and competitiveness in the mobility sector.
status_evidence: The mFund has been allocated funding and is operational.

source_quote: The government’s mFund supports investment in data-driven innovation, research projects, SMEs and start-ups in mobility.

growth_orientation_rationale: Enhances access to financing for innovative start-ups, thereby fostering entrepreneurship and innovation.

description: The German government established the Future Fund, equipped with EUR 10 billion, to improve access to credit for the growth phase of start-ups and further develop the venture capital market.
source_quote: In 2021, the government established the Future Fund, which was equipped with EUR 10 billion, to improve access to credit for the growth phase of start-ups and further develop the venture capital market.

growth_orientation_rationale: The reform aims to accelerate the transition to renewable energy, which can enhance productivity and innovation in the energy sector.
status_evidence: The amendment was passed by the German Bundestag in June 2021.

description: Germany's Federal Climate Change Act was amended to aim for climate neutrality by 2045, with a target to reduce GHG emissions by 65% by 2030 compared to 1990 levels. This ambitious reform includes legally binding annual emission limits for each sector and aims to triple the speed of emission reduction.
source_quote: In June 2021, the German Bundestag passed an amendment of the Federal Climate Change Act, aiming to reach climate neutrality (net-zero) by 2045.

growth_orientation_rationale: Digitalizing public services can reduce administrative burdens for businesses, leading to increased efficiency and productivity.

growth_orientation_rationale: The investment in green technologies and infrastructure is expected to enhance productivity and innovation in the energy sector, contributing to long-term economic growth.

source_quote: The federal government has adopted several comprehensive climate programmes before and during the COVID-19 crisis, totalling over EUR 80 billion.

source_quote: A 2022 reform is welcome as it links wage subsidies to high-skilled employment and removes the eligibility condition of a minimum distance for trade in goods and services.

source_quote: The relaxation of eligibility conditions for investment subsidies for climate-friendly and research-intensive investments after the 2022 reform of the GRW are welcome.

description: The German government plans to modernise and digitalise public administration to improve efficiency and support innovative firms, which could enhance business dynamism and productivity.

growth_orientation_rationale: By increasing access to venture capital, the reform supports the growth of innovative start-ups, which can enhance productivity and competitiveness in the economy.

status_evidence: The programme was launched in September 2024 to address the funding gap for start-ups.
importance_rationale: This reform represents a significant structural change in the financing landscape for start-ups, aiming to mobilise substantial private investment and enhance the overall innovation ecosystem.
description: The federal government has strengthened public co-financing of venture capital through the Growth and Innovation Capital for Germany programme, which aims to mobilise EUR 12 billion to secure a total of EUR 30 billion in innovative start-up financing by 2030.
source_quote: To address the funding gap for start-ups, the federal government and its development bank have strengthened public co-financing of venture capital.

growth_orientation_rationale: By lowering barriers to public listings, the reform encourages investment in innovative firms, enhancing their growth potential and access to capital.

source_quote: The Future Financing Act simplifies the requirements for initial public offerings by reducing the minimum market capitalisation from EUR 1.25 million to EUR 1 million.

growth_orientation_rationale: Strengthening competition enforcement can foster innovation by ensuring a level playing field and preventing anti-competitive practices that hinder new entrants.

description: Germany has strengthened competition enforcement by introducing a market investigation tool that allows the competition authority to issue binding orders to firms to correct market distortions identified through sector-specific investigations.
source_quote: Competition enforcement has been recently strengthened by introducing a market investigation tool.

growth_orientation_rationale: Enhancing infrastructure is expected to raise productivity and facilitate economic integration, thereby supporting regional growth.

description: Germany aims to improve digital, energy, innovation, and transport infrastructure to support regional development amidst structural changes. This includes better coordination of place-based policies with federal grants to enhance spending efficiency.
source_quote: Improving digital, energy, innovation and transport infrastructure is key for regional development.

growth_orientation_rationale: This initiative is expected to enhance productivity and innovation in green technologies, contributing to long-term economic growth and environmental sustainability.
status_evidence: The government plans to allocate up to EUR 50 billion for carbon contracts for difference schemes over the next 15 years.
importance_rationale: This reform represents a major shift in Germany's industrial policy towards sustainable practices, with substantial funding aimed at transforming key sectors and addressing climate change.
description: Germany is implementing a significant increase in R&D support aimed at fostering the development of new green technologies, including green hydrogen, to facilitate emission reductions in high-cost sectors like steel and cement production.
source_quote: R&D support is provided to foster the development of new green technologies, for example green hydrogen, and facilitate emission reductions in sectors with high abatement costs.

growth_orientation_rationale: Redirecting funds from broad subsidies to targeted R&D can enhance innovation in green technologies, leading to long-term cost reductions and environmental benefits.

importance_rationale: This reform significantly improves the efficiency of infrastructure development, which is vital for the energy transition, but does not represent a complete overhaul of the system.
description: The government has simplified planning and approval procedures for electricity grid expansion by classifying it as a project of overriding national interest, which accelerates permit approvals.
source_quote: The government has simplified planning and approval procedures by classifying the electricity grid expansion as a project with overriding national interest.

growth_orientation_rationale: Enhancing university engagement with venture capital will facilitate the transfer of research into marketable products, thus driving innovation and economic growth.
status_evidence: The government plans to allow universities to engage more closely with venture capital funds.
importance_rationale: This initiative is significant as it aims to bridge the gap between research and market application, enhancing the innovation ecosystem.

source_quote: The federal government should also review the regulatory framework to allow universities to engage more closely with venture capital funds.

growth_orientation_rationale: Improving broadband connectivity enhances digital technology adoption by firms, fostering regional development and attracting skilled workers.

description: The allocation of about EUR 760 million in broadband support through the GFS programme aims to improve connectivity in lagging regions, addressing market failures that lead to underinvestment in high-speed broadband capacity.
source_quote: The allocation of about EUR 760 million in broadband support through the GFS programme to lagging regions... is a welcome step.

importance_rationale: This reform represents a significant structural change in the R&D funding landscape, enhancing the capacity of firms to invest in innovation.
description: Germany has introduced a refundable R&D tax credit that subsidises 25% and 35% of up to EUR 10 million of business expenditure on R&D per year for large firms and SMEs, respectively, to improve conditions for firms investing in knowledge-based capital.
source_quote: The refundable R&D tax credit subsidises 25% and 35% of up to EUR 10 million of business expenditure on R&D per year for large firms and SMEs.

growth_orientation_rationale: By facilitating access to support for digital transformation, this reform enhances the innovation capacity of SMEs, which is vital for overall economic growth.
status_evidence: The application procedures of the Central Innovation Programme for SMEs have been simplified.
importance_rationale: This reform significantly improves the accessibility of support for SMEs, which is crucial for enhancing their innovation capabilities.
description: Recent reforms have simplified the application procedures of the Central Innovation Programme for SMEs (ZIM), which supports SMEs in their digital transformation and fosters collaboration with research institutions.
source_quote: Recent reforms have partly simplified the time-consuming and complex application procedures of the Central Innovation Programme for SMEs.

growth_orientation_rationale: Increasing R&D funding is expected to enhance innovation capacity and productivity in the economy.

importance_rationale: The increase in R&D spending represents a major commitment to enhancing the innovation ecosystem.
description: The German government plans to raise R&D spending from currently below 3.0% to 3.5% of GDP by 2025, with a focus on digitalisation and artificial intelligence. Additionally, an investment program was launched to support the expansion of childcare services until 2020, which indirectly supports R&D by improving workforce participation.
source_quote: The federal government has launched an investment program until 2020 that supports expansion of childcare services.

growth_orientation_rationale: Improving broadband infrastructure is essential for facilitating innovation and the adoption of new technologies across sectors.

description: Germany aims to roll out gigabit fixed broadband networks throughout the country by 2025 to enhance technology diffusion and support the adoption of data-intensive new technologies.
source_quote: The government has set an ambitious goal to roll out gigabit fixed broadband networks throughout the country by 2025.

growth_orientation_rationale: Improving broadband infrastructure is essential for enhancing digital connectivity, which can drive productivity and innovation across various sectors.

importance_rationale: This initiative represents a structural change in Germany's digital infrastructure policy, aiming to significantly enhance connectivity and support economic growth.
description: The German government has set an ambitious goal for nationwide gigabit Internet coverage by 2025, supported by a state aid programme that allocates around EUR 11 billion for broadband deployment.
source_quote: The federal government has put in place a number of public broadband subsidies... to achieve this goal.

growth_orientation_rationale: Improved coordination of policies is expected to enhance regional economic dynamism and support innovation in local economies.

importance_rationale: This reform represents a significant structural change in how funding is allocated to support regional development, with a focus on innovation and economic activity.
description: Germany's Federal Funding System for Structural Development regions aims to foster business activity and employment in disadvantaged regions by providing investment grants, wage subsidies, and support for research and innovation.
source_quote: The GFS programmes provide investment grants, wage subsidies, below-market loans, support for research and innovation, employee training and digitalisation for firms.

growth_orientation_rationale: The subsidies are designed to promote renewable energy production, which can lead to long-term environmental benefits and economic growth through the development of a competitive wind energy sector.
status_evidence: The subsidies have been in place since 1992 and have significantly supported the growth of the wind energy sector.
importance_rationale: The reform represents a major commitment to renewable energy, significantly impacting the energy sector and contributing to Denmark's leadership in wind energy technology.
description: Denmark has implemented substantial public subsidies to support the wind turbine sector, which includes production subsidies, tax subsidies for co-operatively-owned wind turbines, and guaranteed prices for wind-generated electricity.
source_quote: The high cost of producing wind turbine electricity has required substantial public subsidies to enable the sector to expand, totalling almost DKr4 billion over the past six years.

growth_orientation_rationale: Facilitating access to funding for innovative startups is expected to enhance entrepreneurship and innovation, contributing positively to economic growth.
status_evidence: Both initiatives have been successfully established and are operational.
importance_rationale: The establishment of a risk capital market and a permanent support scheme represents significant but not structural changes to the entrepreneurial ecosystem.
description: The Danish government established a risk capital market for entrepreneurs and made an entrepreneurial support scheme permanent, aimed at enhancing the entrepreneurial climate and addressing market failures in the supply of risk capital to SMEs, facilitating access to funding for innovative startups.
source_quote: An entrepreneurial support scheme has been made permanent, and has been followed by government intervention to establish a market for subordinate loan capital to enterprises.

growth_orientation_rationale: Enhancing competition and innovation in the rail transport sector is expected to improve efficiency and service quality, contributing to economic growth.
status_evidence: The framework has been established and is currently in effect.
importance_rationale: The establishment of a framework for competition and innovation represents a significant change in the governance of the rail transport sector.
description: The Danish government established a framework for improving competition in the rail transport sector, which includes measures to enhance innovation in the sector.
source_quote: Parliament adopts a framework for improving competition in the rail transport sector.

growth_orientation_rationale: The tax credits incentivize private sector investment in R&D, potentially leading to increased innovation and productivity.
status_evidence: The competition package was introduced in January 2002.
importance_rationale: The introduction of tax credits for R&D represents a significant policy change aimed at enhancing private sector innovation, although it is part of a broader regulatory simplification effort.
description: A competition package was introduced to simplify regulation and ease firms’ administrative burdens, including a pilot scheme on tax credits for business R&D investments for the years 2002 and 2003.
source_quote: A competition package was introduced in January 2002 to simplify regulation and ease firms’ administrative burdens.

growth_orientation_rationale: Simplifying tax rules and providing tax credits are expected to increase private investment in innovation, thereby supporting economic growth.
status_evidence: The tax credit scheme has been introduced and is operational.
importance_rationale: These reforms are significant in promoting private investment but do not represent a complete overhaul of the system.
description: The Danish government is working to simplify complicated tax rules that hinder private investment in innovation and venture capital, while also having introduced a tax credit scheme to encourage collaboration between firms and public research institutions. These measures aim to enhance research partnerships and stimulate private sector investment in innovation.
source_quote: A tax credit scheme was tried out in 2002 whereby a firm received a 150% tax credit for payments made to a public institution as part of a collaborative research project.

growth_orientation_rationale: Enhancing technology transfer and commercialization is expected to lead to increased innovation and economic growth.
status_evidence: The reform has been put into practice, allowing universities to claim ownership of inventions.
importance_rationale: The reform significantly changes the ownership structure of inventions, which is a major shift in policy.
description: Denmark's government has implemented a reform allowing universities to claim ownership of their employees' inventions, which enhances their ability to commercialize intellectual property and boost technology transfer. This reform aims to improve technology transfer to enhance the commercialization of research, addressing previous bureaucratic obstacles.
source_quote: A reform in 2000 improved technology transfer, but research funding is still largely institution-based with little explicit link to quality.

growth_orientation_rationale: Increasing R&D spending and implementing performance-based funding are expected to enhance research quality and relevance, contributing to economic growth.
status_evidence: R&D spending has increased, and the government is actively working on the funding mechanism.
importance_rationale: The shift to performance-based funding is significant but does not represent a complete overhaul of the funding system.
description: Denmark has seen an increase in R&D spending, indicating a commitment to enhancing its research capabilities and innovation environment. The government plans to shift towards a contestable performance-based funding mechanism for research, allowing private firms to compete for public research funds on equal terms, which is expected to improve the effectiveness of the research budget by tying funding to quality outcomes.
source_quote: Getting better results from the research budget would also be useful. One way is to shift further towards a contestable performance-based funding mechanism and to tie funding to quality.

growth_orientation_rationale: Easing bankruptcy rules can help preserve viable businesses and promote innovation by allowing them to recover.
status_evidence: The reform has been successfully implemented since 2005.
importance_rationale: The reform is an adjustment to existing rules rather than a major overhaul.
description: Bankruptcy rules have been eased to allow greater opportunities for informal corporate rescue plans, facilitating smoother transitions for struggling businesses.
source_quote: Bankruptcy rules were eased October 2005.

growth_orientation_rationale: Encouraging pension funds to invest in venture capital is expected to enhance funding for innovative startups.
status_evidence: The reform has been enacted and is currently in effect.
importance_rationale: The reform is significant as it modifies tax rules to stimulate investment in innovation.
description: Taxation rules for pension funds have been revised to encourage their participation in the venture capital market, including a temporary 5% tax relief for investments via SME market places.
source_quote: Taxation of pension funds has been simplified from January 2006.

growth_orientation_rationale: The impact on economic growth is ambiguous as it focuses on social issues rather than direct innovation.
status_evidence: The measures have been enacted and are currently in effect.
importance_rationale: The reform addresses significant social challenges but does not directly relate to innovation policy.
description: The Danish government has launched several measures to improve integration and reduce ghetto problems, including renovating and modernising buildings in the social housing sector and earmarking funds for social initiatives.
source_quote: The government has recently launched several measures to cope with integration and ghetto problems.

growth_orientation_rationale: By enhancing skills and promoting lifelong learning, the strategy supports the development of a more capable workforce, which is essential for innovation.
status_evidence: The initiatives outlined in the Globalisation Strategy have been put into practice since 2006.
importance_rationale: This reform represents a major initiative to align education and training with the needs of the economy, significantly impacting human capital development.
description: Denmark's Globalisation Strategy from 2006 aims to enhance R&D and higher education financing, promoting lifelong learning and skill development in the public sector. This includes systematic projections of future staffing and skill needs, and expanding vocational training for social and health assistants.
source_quote: In June 2007, a major agreement was entered between the government, the local/regional authorities and the unions covering virtually all parts of the public sector workforce.

growth_orientation_rationale: The reform is expected to enhance public sector efficiency, which can lead to better allocation of resources and improved service delivery.
status_evidence: A major structural reform will come into force from January 2007.
importance_rationale: This reform represents a significant overhaul of local governance structures, which is expected to have lasting impacts on public administration efficiency and service delivery.
description: A major structural reform will come into force from January 2007, reducing the number of municipalities from 271 to 98 and replacing the 14 counties by 5 regions, aimed at improving public sector efficiency.
source_quote: A major structural reform will come into force from January 2007 reducing the number of municipalities from 271 to 98 and replacing the 14 counties by 5 regions.

growth_orientation_rationale: Increased funding for R&D is expected to enhance innovation and competitiveness in various sectors.
status_evidence: The funding has been allocated and utilized for various R&D initiatives.
importance_rationale: This significant investment in R&D is a major reform aimed at enhancing the country's innovation capacity.
description: The Danish government announced investments of an additional €1.5 billion in R&D over the period of 2007-2010 to boost research and innovation activities.
source_quote: The government announced investments of an additional €1.5 billion in R&D over 2007-10.

growth_orientation_rationale: Employer-financed vocational training is expected to enhance the skills of the workforce, contributing to innovation and productivity.
status_evidence: The agreement has been put into practice and is currently active.
importance_rationale: While significant, this agreement is more of an incremental adjustment rather than a structural reform.
description: A new three-year collective employment agreement for the manufacturing sector was negotiated in 2007, which includes a commitment to employer-financed vocational training, allowing employees to receive training while earning a portion of their wages.
source_quote: A new three-year collective employment agreement for the manufacturing sector... contained a new commitment to employer-financed vocational training.

growth_orientation_rationale: These centres aim to enhance the entrepreneurial environment and provide tailored support to high-growth firms, which can lead to increased innovation and economic dynamism.
