status_evidence: The Business Development Centres were established to support entrepreneurship.
importance_rationale: The establishment of these centres represents a significant effort to enhance support for entrepreneurship, although it is part of a broader initiative rather than a standalone major reform.
description: The Danish government established five Business Development Centres (Vaeksthus) in 2007 to promote entrepreneurship and support high-growth firms.
source_quote: In 2007, five Business Development Centres (Vaeksthus) were established to promote entrepreneurship and high-growth firms.

growth_orientation_rationale: By easing restrictions on technology transfer, the reform enhances the ability of research institutions to commercialize their innovations, thus supporting economic growth.
status_evidence: The removal of restrictions has been enacted and is in effect as of 2008.
importance_rationale: This reform significantly improves the environment for technology transfer but does not represent a fundamental overhaul of the system.
description: Denmark has removed remaining restrictions on setting up technology transfer companies and science parks, facilitating the commercialization of research and innovation.
source_quote: Remove remaining restrictions on setting up technology transfer companies and science parks.

growth_orientation_rationale: The tax relief is designed to encourage investment in startups, which can drive innovation and economic growth.
status_evidence: The tax relief measure was enacted and is operational as of 2008.
importance_rationale: While this reform is beneficial for the startup ecosystem, it is a temporary measure and does not represent a systemic change.
description: The Danish government has introduced a temporary 5% tax relief for pension funds investing in the venture capital market, aimed at stimulating investment in innovative startups.
source_quote: Pension funds will have a temporary 5% tax relief for investment via entering the venture capital market.

growth_orientation_rationale: By providing funding for basic research, the fund supports foundational knowledge creation, which is essential for long-term innovation.
status_evidence: The Financing Fund has been established and is operational since 2008.
importance_rationale: This fund is significant for supporting basic research but does not represent a major overhaul of the funding system.
description: The Financing Fund was created to support basic research in Denmark, managing around DKK1.5 billion in assets.
source_quote: The Financing Fund manages around DKK1.5 billion in assets that are to be used to support basic research in Denmark.

growth_orientation_rationale: Investing in transport infrastructure is expected to enhance connectivity and efficiency, supporting economic growth.
status_evidence: The initiative has been actively pursued and funded since its announcement.
importance_rationale: This initiative represents a major investment in infrastructure with significant implications for the economy.
description: The Danish government announced a 'green transport' initiative involving DKK94 billion in infrastructure spending over 2009-2020, aimed at upgrading rail transport and reducing car use.
source_quote: The government announced a 'green transport' initiative to follow up on a transport policy framework announced in December 2008.

growth_orientation_rationale: This fund aims to improve infrastructure, which is crucial for economic development and efficiency.
status_evidence: The fund has been operational since its creation, financing various infrastructure projects.
importance_rationale: The establishment of a large fund for infrastructure is a significant reform with broad economic implications.
description: The Danish government created a DKK90 billion fund to finance infrastructure projects over 2009-2020, addressing a significant infrastructure backlog and prioritizing investments based on socio-economic returns.
source_quote: The government created a DKK90 billion fund to finance infrastructure projects over 2009-20, including in environment and public transport.

growth_orientation_rationale: Improving the business environment is expected to enhance entrepreneurship and innovation.
status_evidence: The reforms have been enacted and are currently in effect.
importance_rationale: This reform package represents a significant overhaul of the business operating environment.
description: The Danish government unveiled a new package of reforms aimed at improving conditions for starting and operating businesses, which includes measures to facilitate access to authorities and streamline administrative processes.
source_quote: In March 2009, the government unveiled a new package of reforms to that effect, including providing better conditions for starting and operating businesses.

growth_orientation_rationale: Increasing public R&D funding and competitive allocation is expected to enhance research capabilities and stimulate innovation.
status_evidence: The reform has been put into practice as of 2010.
importance_rationale: The reform represents a significant structural change in public R&D funding policy.
description: The Danish government proposed that public R&D funding should reach 1% of GDP by 2010, with half of all public research funding allocated on a competitive basis. This shift towards project-based public research funding allows private firms to bid for funds on equal terms, emphasizing quality assessments in grant allocation.
source_quote: The government’s globalisation strategy implies a shift to more contestable research funding and more weight on quality assessments when allocating research grants.

growth_orientation_rationale: Encouraging timely completion of tertiary education is expected to enhance the supply of skilled researchers and innovators.
status_evidence: The proposal has been made but not yet implemented.
importance_rationale: The reform is significant in promoting educational outcomes but is not a major overhaul.
description: The Danish government proposed adjustments to public study grants to encourage early entry and on-schedule completion of tertiary education, including cutting monthly grants for late starters and offering bonuses for academic progress.
source_quote: To create such incentives, the government has proposed a set of adjustments of the public study grants as part of the welfare reform currently being discussed.

growth_orientation_rationale: Enhancing financial options for small and medium-sized companies supports their growth and innovation potential.
status_evidence: The scheme has been actively in place since its boost in 2009-10.
importance_rationale: The reform significantly boosts financial options for SMEs, which is crucial for their development.
description: A loan guarantee scheme available to all firms has been boosted in 2009-10, aimed at enhancing financial options for small and medium-sized companies.
source_quote: A loan guarantee scheme available to all firms has been boosted in 2009-10.

growth_orientation_rationale: Creating a national commitment to entrepreneurship education enhances the skills and capabilities of future innovators.
status_evidence: The foundation was established and is operational since 2010.
importance_rationale: The establishment of a foundation signifies a significant step towards enhancing entrepreneurship education.
description: The Danish Foundation for Entrepreneurship was established in 2010 to create a coherent national commitment to education and training in entrepreneurship.
source_quote: The Danish Foundation for Entrepreneurship was established in 2010 as part of the Strategy for Education and Training in Entrepreneurship.

growth_orientation_rationale: The shift to project-based funding is expected to enhance the quality and relevance of research, thereby supporting innovation and productivity.
status_evidence: The High Technology Foundation was established and operational by 2012.
importance_rationale: This reform represents a significant structural change in how public research funding is allocated and managed.
description: Denmark is shifting towards project-based public research funding, establishing the High Technology Foundation with an allocation of DKK16 billion to enhance high technology research capabilities. This new funding model allows private firms to bid for funds on equal terms and ties funding to quality assessments.
source_quote: The High Technology Foundation aims to facilitate the development of high technology research and will have DKK16 billion in assets by 2012.

growth_orientation_rationale: This reform enhances financial support for R&D activities, particularly for young firms, thereby fostering innovation and productivity growth.
status_evidence: The scheme was introduced to support R&D spending among firms.
importance_rationale: This reform represents a significant change in the support structure for R&D, particularly for small and young firms, which is crucial for fostering innovation and economic growth.
description: The Danish government introduced a new scheme allowing firms that spend on R&D and face after-tax income losses to benefit from a tax refund of 25% of these losses, aimed at improving access to funding for young and financially constrained firms.
source_quote: In 2012, a new tax incentives scheme was introduced, allowing firms that spend on R&D and face after-tax income losses to benefit from a tax refund of 25% of these losses.

growth_orientation_rationale: By fostering collaboration between businesses and educational institutions, this initiative aims to enhance knowledge transfer and innovation outcomes.
status_evidence: The Danish Innovation Strategy includes various initiatives to encourage cooperation between business and education institutions.
importance_rationale: This initiative represents a significant effort to enhance collaboration between sectors, which is crucial for driving innovation.
description: The Danish Innovation Strategy launched in December 2012 includes initiatives to encourage cooperation between businesses and educational institutions through public-private partnerships.
source_quote: The Danish Innovation Strategy that was launched by the government in December 2012 includes various initiatives to encourage cooperation between business and education institutions.

growth_orientation_rationale: The strategy aims to foster innovation and job creation, which can enhance productivity and economic growth.
status_evidence: The Innovation Strategy was launched with specific initiatives.
importance_rationale: The strategy represents a comprehensive approach to enhancing innovation across multiple sectors, which is crucial for long-term economic growth.
description: Denmark launched an Innovation Strategy in December 2012, comprising 27 initiatives aimed at creating new jobs and growth through enhanced research, innovation, and education.
source_quote: In December 2012, the Ministry of Science, Innovation and Higher Education launched an Innovation Strategy, with a view to create new jobs and growth through 27 initiatives in the areas of research, innovation and education.

growth_orientation_rationale: Enhancing cooperation between public and private sectors can lead to more efficient public services and stimulate innovation in the private sector.
status_evidence: The Council for Public-Private Co-operation was established in April 2013 to support this initiative.
importance_rationale: This reform represents a significant effort to enhance the role of the private sector in public procurement, which can lead to improved service delivery and innovation.
description: Denmark has implemented a strategy to promote public-private partnerships (PPPs) to enhance competition for public sector contracts and improve cooperation between public authorities and private companies.
source_quote: In 2011, a strategy to promote public-private cooperation was initiated.

growth_orientation_rationale: Enhances collaboration and knowledge sharing, which can lead to increased innovation and competitiveness among SMEs.
status_evidence: The new cluster strategy was launched in April 2013.
importance_rationale: This reform represents a significant structural change aimed at enhancing innovation through improved cluster dynamics, which is crucial for the competitiveness of the Danish economy.
description: A new cluster strategy was launched to improve framework conditions for innovation and knowledge sharing, focusing on expanding clusters and increasing collaboration at various levels.
source_quote: In April 2013, a new cluster strategy was launched to improve framework conditions for innovation and knowledge sharing, with a view to expanding clusters.

growth_orientation_rationale: By incentivizing quicker completion of tertiary education, the reform aims to increase the skilled labor supply, which can enhance productivity and economic growth.
status_evidence: The reform was enacted in April 2013.
importance_rationale: This reform represents a significant overhaul of the grant system, aiming to improve educational outcomes and labor market readiness, which is crucial for economic competitiveness.
description: In April 2013, the state grant system for tertiary education was reformed to speed up completion and thereby raise labour supply, introducing stricter conditions for grant eligibility and shortening the average duration of study programmes.
source_quote: In April 2013, the state grant system for tertiary education was reformed to speed up completion and thereby raise labour supply.

growth_orientation_rationale: The merger aims to streamline funding processes, reduce red tape, and enhance the effectiveness of public research funding.
status_evidence: The three different funding bodies will be merged into the Innovation Foundation.
importance_rationale: This reform represents a significant structural change in the funding landscape for research, aiming to enhance efficiency and effectiveness in public R&D support.
description: In 2014, Denmark plans to merge three different funding bodies into the Innovation Foundation to improve the efficiency and transparency of public support for basic research.
source_quote: In 2014, the three different funding bodies will be merged into the Innovation Foundation with a view to improve efficiency, increase transparency and reduce red tape.

growth_orientation_rationale: Facilitating innovation in SMEs is expected to enhance competition and drive economic growth.
status_evidence: The programme has been put into action and is currently operational.
importance_rationale: The programme represents a significant initiative to support SMEs in innovation, indicating a notable but not transformative change.
description: The new InnoBooster programme is designed to facilitate innovation in SMEs, ensuring sufficient competition and SME participation in demand-side innovation policies.
source_quote: The new InnoBooster programme is designed to facilitate innovation in SMEs.

growth_orientation_rationale: The Council aims to harness technological changes for broad economic benefits, potentially enhancing productivity and innovation across sectors.
status_evidence: The Council was established and is actively functioning.
importance_rationale: The establishment of the Council represents a significant step in coordinating responses to technological disruption, fostering collaboration among various stakeholders.
description: The Danish Government launched a 'Disruption Council' to analyze and discuss future challenges from technological changes and globalization, aiming to ensure that all Danes benefit from economic development.
source_quote: In May 2017, the Danish Government established a 'Disruption Council', a partnership between the social partners, businesses, experts and the Government.

growth_orientation_rationale: The reform aims to address market failures by providing better access to capital and guidance for startups, which can enhance innovation and firm growth.
status_evidence: The reform was approved and implemented to simplify the system.
importance_rationale: The simplification of the business promotion services is significant as it enhances the support structure for startups, which is crucial for fostering innovation and economic growth.
description: In 2018, Denmark approved a reform to simplify the public business promotion services system, enhancing support for startups and medium-term firm growth.
source_quote: In 2018, a welcome reform was approved to simplify the system significantly.

growth_orientation_rationale: By improving technology transfer mechanisms, the reform is expected to enhance collaboration between universities and businesses, leading to increased commercialization of research outputs.
status_evidence: The strategy was launched with specific initiatives to strengthen technology transfers.
importance_rationale: The reform represents a significant effort to enhance the commercialization of research through improved technology transfer, which is crucial for innovation.
description: In December 2017, Denmark launched a new research and innovation strategy aimed at strengthening research in technology and enhancing technology transfers from universities to businesses, including an inspection of existing efforts and legislation to remove barriers.
source_quote: In December 2017, a new research and innovation strategy was launched, including initiatives to strengthen research in technology and technology transfers from universities to business.

growth_orientation_rationale: Enhancing cybersecurity is expected to build trust in digital technologies, which is essential for their adoption and the overall productivity growth of firms.
status_evidence: The Government launched a national strategy for cyber and information security.
importance_rationale: The reform addresses a critical area of concern for businesses, particularly small firms, and aims to enhance their resilience against cyber threats, which is vital for fostering innovation.
description: The 2018 Digital Growth reform package includes initiatives to strengthen cybersecurity in companies, establishing a single digital point of entry for reporting IT security incidents and launching a national strategy for cyber and information security.
source_quote: The 2018 Digital Growth reform package contains a number of initiatives to strengthen cyber security in companies.

growth_orientation_rationale: Increasing the number of STEM graduates will enhance the skill base necessary for innovation and technological advancement.
status_evidence: The Government launched a Technology Pact aiming to raise the number of STEM graduates.
importance_rationale: This initiative is significant in addressing skill shortages in STEM fields, which are critical for future innovation.
description: The Government launched a Technology Pact aiming to raise the number of STEM graduates in collaboration with companies, educational and research institutions.
source_quote: In April 2018, the Government also launched a Technology Pact aiming to raise the number of STEM graduates in collaboration with companies.

growth_orientation_rationale: Encouraging timely completion of education and increasing competitive research funding are expected to enhance human capital and innovation capacity.
component_name: Tertiary Education and R&D Funding Reform
status_evidence: The measures have been put into practice as part of ongoing government initiatives.
importance_rationale: The reforms are significant but not structural, focusing on enhancing education and competitive funding mechanisms.
description: Denmark is implementing measures to encourage timely completion of tertiary education, including making it easier for students to transition from secondary to tertiary education and providing universities with incentives to promote on-time completion. Additionally, the government has been working towards increasing the share of public research grants allocated on a competitive basis, aiming for at least 50% of funds to be subject to open competition, alongside investments in R&D in the agriculture sector to support green growth.
source_quote: The government reached agreement with its parliamentary partners in June 2009 on a 'green growth' initiative with new measures focused on improving the environmental performance of the agriculture sector.

growth_orientation_rationale: Simplifying support schemes is expected to improve access and effectiveness of public funding for innovation, particularly benefiting SMEs.
status_evidence: The merger of the Market Development Fund with the Innovation Fund has been finalized.
importance_rationale: This reform represents a significant change in the structure of public support for innovation, aiming to enhance efficiency and accessibility for businesses.
description: Denmark plans to simplify its existing range of business support schemes by merging the Market Development Fund with the Innovation Fund, aiming to enhance public support for innovation while maintaining expertise.
source_quote: A recent political agreement plans to simplify the existing range of business support schemes, which will merge the Market Development Fund with the Innovation Fund.

growth_orientation_rationale: Increasing tax incentives for R&D is expected to stimulate private sector investment in innovation, particularly benefiting young and innovative firms.
status_evidence: The enhanced tax allowance rate will gradually increase as planned.
importance_rationale: This reform is a significant adjustment to the existing tax incentive framework, aimed at increasing R&D investment in the private sector.
description: Denmark is set to increase R&D tax incentives by introducing an enhanced tax allowance for current R&D expenditure, gradually increasing from 1.5% in 2019 to 10% in 2026.
source_quote: Recent reform will increase R&D tax incentives by introducing enhanced tax allowance for current R&D expenditure.

growth_orientation_rationale: Improving the education system aligns skills with market demand, enhancing productivity and innovation potential.
status_evidence: An agreement was passed in December 2017 to reform university funding.
importance_rationale: This reform represents a structural change in how university funding is allocated, which is crucial for aligning education with future labor market needs.
description: The Government has initiated a wide scale reflection on how to improve the education system and make it more relevant for the labour market by reforming the university funding system and better targeting labour market demand and future skill needs in education.
source_quote: An agreement was passed in December 2017 to reform university funding based on quality and outcomes of students.

growth_orientation_rationale: The strategy supports innovation in clean technologies, enhancing sustainability and economic growth.
status_evidence: Programmes like EUDP are already in operation.
importance_rationale: The strategy represents a major overhaul of Denmark's approach to clean technology R&D.
description: Denmark is implementing a comprehensive strategy to support research and development in clean technologies, aiming to cut carbon emissions by 70% by 2030. This includes attracting private investment, enhancing public-private cooperation, and focusing on missions such as carbon capture, power-to-X, and eco-friendly agriculture. Major programmes like the Energy Technology Development and Demonstration Programme (EUDP) are central to this effort.
source_quote: The green research strategy is focused on four missions: 1) carbon capture, utilisation and storage, 2) power-to-X, 3) climate and eco-friendly agriculture and food production, 4) recycling and reduction of plastic waste.

growth_orientation_rationale: The tax incentive encourages private sector investment in R&D, boosting innovation.
status_evidence: The tax allowance was applied in 2020 and extended.
importance_rationale: The temporary increase is a significant incentive for private R&D investment.
description: Denmark temporarily increased the R&D enhanced tax allowance to 130% for R&D expenses up to DKK 850 million in 2020 and 2021, later extended to 2022.
source_quote: The package also included a temporary increase in the R&D enhanced tax allowance to 130% in 2020 and 2021 (later extended to 2022) for R&D expenses up to DKK 850 million.

growth_orientation_rationale: Integrating digital technologies in healthcare is expected to improve service delivery and efficiency, contributing positively to economic growth.
status_evidence: The political agreement has been reached and initiatives are underway to implement the integration of digital technologies in healthcare.
importance_rationale: The agreement represents a significant step towards improving healthcare services through technology, though it is not a complete overhaul.
description: A political agreement was reached to strengthen the integration of healthcare services and develop digital technologies to address shortages in healthcare.
source_quote: A political agreement was reached to strengthen the integration of healthcare services at the local level and quality assurance.

growth_orientation_rationale: The reforms are designed to stimulate R&D investment and innovation in the private sector, which is expected to enhance productivity and economic growth.
status_evidence: The reforms have been officially implemented as part of Denmark's ongoing efforts to boost R&D investment.
importance_rationale: The reforms significantly enhance existing tax incentives for R&D, which is a notable change but not a complete overhaul of the system.
description: Denmark has introduced favourable depreciation rules for green investment and increased the tax allowance for R&D expenses from 101.5% to 130%, with a DKK 50 million cap on qualifying expenditures. Additionally, plans are in place to further raise public support for research and development by making the R&D tax subsidy incremental, aiming to enhance incentives for innovation, particularly in small companies.
source_quote: The research and development tax subsidy remains relatively low by international standards. Further increase public support to research and development by raising the R&D tax subsidy and making it incremental.

growth_orientation_rationale: Fostering collaboration between academia and industry is expected to enhance innovation and commercialization of research, contributing to economic growth.
status_evidence: The funding allocation and initiatives have been officially implemented as part of Denmark's innovation strategy.
importance_rationale: The allocation of funds and the focus on collaboration represent a significant but not transformative change in policy.
description: Denmark allocated DKK 700 million to develop green research innovation partnerships, enhancing cooperation between firms and universities to foster innovation. Additionally, the government aims to raise incentives for cooperation between universities and businesses by providing targeted funding and revising intellectual property rights.
source_quote: Raise incentives for the cooperation between universities and businesses by providing targeted funding, revising intellectual property rights, and harmonising procedures.

growth_orientation_rationale: Enhancing access to capital for start-ups is expected to stimulate innovation and growth in the entrepreneurial sector.
status_evidence: The initiative has been officially announced and is set to be implemented in 2024.
importance_rationale: The additional funding represents a significant enhancement of support for start-ups, though it is not a complete overhaul of the system.
description: Denmark has prioritized an additional 6 billion DKK towards equity finance and access to capital in the scale-up phase, aiming to enhance support for innovative start-ups and SMEs.
source_quote: Denmark prioritised an additional 6 billion DKK towards equity finance and access to capital in the scale-up phase.

growth_orientation_rationale: Increasing access to higher education is expected to enhance the supply of skilled researchers and innovators, contributing positively to economic growth.
status_evidence: The agreement has been officially announced and is set to be implemented starting in 2024.
importance_rationale: The expansion of university places represents a significant step towards improving human capital, though it is not a complete overhaul of the education system.
description: Denmark's government has announced an agreement to increase the number of university places available for English-taught master's programmes, allowing for an additional 1,100 students each year from 2024-2028 and 2,500 from 2029.
source_quote: The recently announced agreement to allow universities to augment their enrolment of students in English-taught master’s programmes by 1,100 each year from 2024-2028, and by 2,500 from 2029 is welcome.

growth_orientation_rationale: Increasing R&D funding is expected to stimulate innovation and productivity in the business sector, contributing positively to economic growth.
status_evidence: The plan has been officially announced and is set to be implemented by 2025.
importance_rationale: This reform represents a significant increase in public funding for business R&D, marking a major policy shift.
description: Denmark plans to increase business R&D support by 0.25 percentage points of GDP by 2025, aiming to close the gap to the OECD average. This includes raising tax allowances for R&D expenses to 130% for incremental R&D expenses, thereby enhancing public support for business R&D.
source_quote: The government aims to increase business R&D by 0.25 ppt of GDP by 2025 to halve the gap to the OECD average.

growth_orientation_rationale: Improving productivity in the public sector through automation is expected to enhance efficiency and service delivery, contributing positively to economic growth.
status_evidence: The plan has been officially announced and is set to be implemented by 2025.
importance_rationale: The 10-year plan represents a significant structural change in how public services will be delivered.
description: Denmark is preparing a 10-year plan to achieve an additional 10,000 equivalent full-time employees in the public sector through automation and digitisation, which aims to improve productivity in the long-term care sector.
source_quote: Denmark is preparing a 10-year plan to achieve an additional 10,000 equivalent full-time employees in the public sector via automation and digitisation.

growth_orientation_rationale: Increasing the tax deduction for R&D expenditures incentivizes firms to invest more in research and development, which can enhance innovation and productivity.
status_evidence: The tax deduction increase was included in the business and entrepreneurship reform package.
importance_rationale: This reform is significant as it directly impacts the funding available for R&D activities, encouraging firms to enhance their innovative capabilities.
description: A business and entrepreneurship reform package was introduced, which includes a gradual increase in the tax deduction for R&D expenditures from 100% to 110% by 2026.
source_quote: Gradually increased tax deduction of R&D expenditures from 100% to reach 110% in 2026.

growth_orientation_rationale: Improving access to venture capital is expected to stimulate the growth of small and medium-sized enterprises, enhancing innovation and job creation.
status_evidence: A government committee proposed an easing of access to venture capital for small and medium-sized enterprises.
importance_rationale: This proposal represents a significant shift in policy aimed at enhancing the financial support available to small businesses, which are crucial for economic dynamism.
description: A government committee proposed easing access to venture capital for small and medium-sized enterprises, allowing insurance companies and pension schemes to invest more in equity, and strengthening banks' capacity for venture capital investment.
source_quote: To encourage the growth of small and medium-sized enterprises, a government committee in mid-1995 proposed an easing of the access to venture capital for such companies.

growth_orientation_rationale: Lowering barriers for entrepreneurs is expected to stimulate innovation and economic activity.
status_evidence: The reform has been officially announced but not yet legislated.
importance_rationale: This reform is significant as it aims to create a more dynamic business environment, though it is not a structural overhaul.
description: Denmark aims to lower barriers for entrepreneurs and innovators to foster a more dynamic business environment, enhancing the startup ecosystem.
source_quote: The programme aims for: Lower barriers for entrepreneurs and innovators.

growth_orientation_rationale: Stimulating business-financed R&D is expected to enhance innovation capacity and productivity in the private sector.
status_evidence: The reform has been officially announced but not yet legislated.
importance_rationale: This reform is significant as it aims to enhance innovation capacity through increased R&D funding, though it is not a major structural change.
description: The Danish government is stimulating business-financed research and development to enhance innovation capacity in the private sector.
source_quote: The programme aims for: Stimulating business-financed research and development.

growth_orientation_rationale: Increasing R&D investment is expected to lead to higher productivity and innovation, benefiting the overall economy.
status_evidence: The government has stated its intention to raise R&D investment as part of its strategy.
importance_rationale: This reform represents a significant policy direction aimed at enhancing R&D investment, which is crucial for long-term economic growth.
description: The Danish government aims to raise research and development (R&D) investment to enhance productivity growth, focusing on improving framework conditions and promoting competition.
source_quote: Raising research and development (R&D) investment, currently close to the average EU level, could contribute to higher total factor productivity growth.

growth_orientation_rationale: Facilitating re-entry for failed entrepreneurs is expected to foster a more dynamic startup ecosystem and encourage innovation.
status_evidence: The proposal has been made but not yet implemented.
importance_rationale: This reform is significant in supporting entrepreneurship but does not represent a major systemic change.
description: The Danish government proposed to relax bankruptcy regulations to facilitate easier re-entry for failed entrepreneurs, which is expected to enhance innovation and growth by allowing entrepreneurs to learn from their failures.
source_quote: The government put a proposal to parliament in late 2004 aimed at relaxing these regulations and making it easier for failed entrepreneurs to start over.

growth_orientation_rationale: Strengthening quality requirements for incubators is expected to enhance support for innovative startups.
status_evidence: The reform has been officially announced but not yet implemented.
importance_rationale: The reform is significant in improving the support structure for startups but is not a major overhaul.
description: Publicly funded business incubators will face stronger quality requirements, and firms undertaking substantial research will be allowed to compete for public research grants.
source_quote: Publicly funded business incubators should face stronger quality requirements.

growth_orientation_rationale: Increased spending on energy research fosters innovation and technological advancement in the energy sector.
component_name: Energy Technology Development and Demonstration Programme
status_evidence: The government has actively increased spending on energy research.
importance_rationale: The increase in funding represents a significant commitment to advancing energy technologies.
description: The Danish government has increased its spending on energy research to support the market maturation of existing technologies and the development of new technologies through the Energy Technology Development and Demonstration Programme.
source_quote: The Danish government has spent more and more on energy research in recent years.

growth_orientation_rationale: The feed-in tariff system incentivizes investment in renewable energy, promoting innovation and technology adoption in the sector.
status_evidence: The feed-in tariff system is currently in operation.
importance_rationale: The implementation of a feed-in tariff system represents a significant policy shift towards supporting renewable energy.
description: Denmark has implemented a feed-in tariff system to support electricity from renewable sources, providing larger subsidies for wind technologies compared to other renewables.
source_quote: A feed-in tariff system is also in place, and it is the main policy to support electricity from renewables.

growth_orientation_rationale: Improving the connection between academia and industry can lead to increased innovation and productivity in the economy.
status_evidence: The recommendation suggests a shift in funding strategy to enhance collaboration.
importance_rationale: This reform represents a significant shift in funding strategy that could enhance innovation capacity through better collaboration.
description: Denmark is moving towards a more balanced mix of project and institutional-based research funding to enhance links between universities and industry.
source_quote: Move towards a more balanced mix of project and institutional based research funding with the objective to increase the links between universities and industry.

growth_orientation_rationale: The strategy aims to enhance innovation capacity and productivity by addressing societal challenges and improving the efficiency of innovation policies.
status_evidence: The government launched an Innovation Strategy with various initiatives.
importance_rationale: The strategy represents a comprehensive approach to enhancing Denmark's innovation ecosystem, with significant implications for productivity and economic growth.
description: In December 2012, the Danish government launched an Innovation Strategy that identified gaps in the innovation framework and proposed initiatives to enhance Denmark's position as an innovation leader, focusing on societal challenges and improving knowledge capacity.
source_quote: In December 2012, the government launched an Innovation Strategy. It identified some gaps in the innovation framework and proposed initiatives to help Denmark remain an innovation leader.

growth_orientation_rationale: Streamlining funding programmes can enhance efficiency and effectiveness in supporting innovation, potentially leading to increased economic growth.
status_evidence: The recommendation to evaluate and streamline innovation funding programmes was made.
importance_rationale: While significant, this reform is more about improving existing structures rather than creating new ones, thus it is important but not major.
description: The government is evaluating the recent merger of different innovation funding programmes to streamline innovation policy instruments and funding programmes.
source_quote: Evaluate the recent merger of different innovation funding programmes and if needed, consider further streamlining innovation policy instruments and funding programmes.

growth_orientation_rationale: By facilitating the market introduction of innovative solutions, the fund is expected to enhance competitiveness and drive economic growth.
status_evidence: The restructuring of the Business Innovation Fund was part of the announced Innovation Strategy.
importance_rationale: The reform represents a significant shift in funding focus, aiming to better align public support with market needs.
description: The restructuring of the 'Business Innovation Fund' into a 'Market Development Fund' aims to support the introduction of innovative solutions to the market, including green and welfare solutions.
source_quote: Restructure the 'Business Innovation Fund' to turn it into a 'Market Development Fund' to support the introduction of innovative solutions to the market, including green and welfare solutions.

growth_orientation_rationale: Improving support for innovative firms can lead to increased productivity and competitiveness in the economy.
status_evidence: The recommendation emphasizes the need for better support mechanisms for innovative firms.
importance_rationale: This reform addresses a significant aspect of the innovation policy framework, focusing on enhancing support for a key segment of the economy.
description: Denmark aims to enhance the efficiency of its innovation policies by ensuring that some schemes provide effective support to young and dynamic innovative firms.
source_quote: It is important to make sure that some schemes provide efficient support to young and dynamic innovative firms.

growth_orientation_rationale: Enhancing R&D tax credits can incentivize firms to invest more in research and development, leading to innovation and economic growth.
status_evidence: The recommendation suggests improvements to R&D tax credit programmes to support innovative firms.
importance_rationale: This reform is significant as it directly impacts the financial incentives for firms to engage in R&D activities.
description: The OECD recommends extending carry-over provisions and cash refunds in R&D tax credit programmes or increasing direct support to better assist young and dynamic firms.
source_quote: Further extend carry-over provisions and cash refunds in R&D tax credit programmes or increase direct support.

growth_orientation_rationale: Streamlining innovation policy instruments is expected to enhance efficiency and effectiveness in supporting innovation.
status_evidence: The reform has been officially announced but not yet legislated.
importance_rationale: The review aims to significantly improve the innovation funding landscape, indicating a substantial but not structural change.
description: The Danish government has initiated a review of the business development system, including the innovation system, to evaluate the recent merger of different innovation funding programmes and consider further streamlining innovation policy instruments and funding.
source_quote: The government has initiated a review of the business development system, including the innovation system.

growth_orientation_rationale: Increases overall business R&D investment, fostering innovation and competitiveness among smaller firms.
status_evidence: The government plans to broaden public support to business R&D.
importance_rationale: This reform is significant as it aims to diversify R&D funding sources and stimulate innovation across a broader range of firms.
description: Denmark is expanding its public support for business R&D through well-designed R&D grants and tax credits aimed at incremental R&D expenses, addressing the concentration of business R&D spending in a few large firms.
source_quote: Broaden public support to business R&D through well-designed R&D grants and tax credits for incremental R&D expenses.

growth_orientation_rationale: Enhances the availability of data for research and innovation, potentially leading to new services and business models.
status_evidence: The government aims to make more public data available to foster innovation.
importance_rationale: This initiative is important as it leverages existing public data to stimulate innovation and research, enhancing the overall innovation ecosystem.
description: The Danish government is investing in open access to public-sector basic data, including weather data, to foster innovation and research opportunities for businesses.
source_quote: Recent digital initiatives by the Government aim at fostering further open access to public-sector basic data.

growth_orientation_rationale: By reducing the tax bias against equity, the ACE could encourage more investment in innovative projects, thereby enhancing economic growth.
status_evidence: The Government has proposed the ACE as a reform to stimulate investment.
importance_rationale: The introduction of an ACE represents a significant shift in corporate tax policy that could fundamentally alter investment incentives and support innovation.
description: The Danish government is considering an allowance for corporate equity (ACE) to reduce the tax bias towards debt financing, which could stimulate investment and innovation.
source_quote: A more fundamental reform to introduce an allowance for corporate equity (ACE) is currently being considered by the Government.

growth_orientation_rationale: Facilitating collaboration is expected to enhance knowledge transfer and commercialization of research outputs.
status_evidence: The recommendation to improve collaboration between universities and businesses is emphasized in the survey.
importance_rationale: This reform is significant as it addresses barriers to collaboration, which is essential for enhancing innovation and economic growth.
description: The Danish government aims to improve collaboration between universities and businesses by simplifying the regulatory framework and enhancing intellectual property rights policies.
source_quote: Improve collaboration between universities and businesses by reducing the complexity of the system regulating cooperation, and improving intellectual property right policies of universities.

growth_orientation_rationale: The strategy aims to enhance digital infrastructure and capabilities, supporting innovation and productivity.
status_evidence: Official announcement for 2022 launch.
importance_rationale: The strategy is a targeted initiative to improve digitalisation.
description: A new digitalisation strategy will be launched in early 2022 based on the Digitization Partnership recommendations.
source_quote: A new digitalisation strategy will be launched in early 2022 on the basis of the Digitization Partnership recommendations released in October 2021.

growth_orientation_rationale: The strategy aims to reduce emissions and promote sustainable practices in agriculture and industry.
status_evidence: Official announcements of investment plans.
importance_rationale: The strategy is significant for its focus on sustainable practices and emissions reduction.
description: Denmark is investing in research and development to enhance agriculture's contribution to a net-zero target, focusing on alternatives to greenhouse gas intensive practices and improving emissions monitoring. The green research strategy also emphasizes developing green fuels and Power-to-X technologies.
source_quote: In the longer term, research and development can contribute to provide alternatives to GHG intensive practices and therefore abate emissions with limited leakage effects.

growth_orientation_rationale: The plan supports green innovation and technology scaling, contributing to sustainable economic growth.
status_evidence: Official announcements of funding allocations.
importance_rationale: The plan provides significant funding for green R&D and innovation.
description: The Danish government announced a Green recovery plan, which includes substantial support for research and development of green technologies, with DKK 3,900 million allocated for this purpose. Additionally, a trans-partisan agreement allocated DKK 6 billion to the Danish Green Investment Fund to promote green innovation and scale up technologies in five key areas.
source_quote: A trans-partisan agreement between the Danish Government and other parties allocated DKK 6 billion to the Danish Green Investment Fund.

growth_orientation_rationale: Continued investment in wind energy supports renewable energy development and sustainability.
status_evidence: Ongoing funding and support for wind energy.
importance_rationale: The programme is a continuation of existing support for wind energy.
description: The Danish government has sustained support for wind research, development, and deployment, with significant subsidies and increasing funding throughout the 2000s, peaking at DKK 618 million in 2013.
source_quote: Sustained support for wind research, development and deployment, with significant subsidies in the late 1970s and 1980s and increasing funding throughout the 2000s, peaking at DKK 618 million in 2013.

growth_orientation_rationale: The development of wind energy islands and charging infrastructure supports renewable energy and sustainable transport.
status_evidence: Official plans for infrastructure development.
importance_rationale: The plan involves large-scale infrastructure projects with significant investment.
description: The Danish government is planning to develop two wind energy islands to provide renewable electricity and sustainable fuels, with the first stage of the North Sea project estimated at EUR 29 billion. Additionally, a 10-year funding program for fast chargers on the trunk road network is part of the Infrastructure Plan 2035.
source_quote: The Danish government is planning to develop two wind energy islands, an artificial island in the North Sea and the Baltic island of Bornholm, to provide renewable electricity, sustainable fuels and interconnection with other countries.

growth_orientation_rationale: By increasing market efficiency and corporate governance, the privatisation programme is expected to foster a more competitive environment conducive to innovation.
status_evidence: The programme has been successfully executed since its initiation in 1993.
importance_rationale: This reform represents a significant structural change in the economy, impacting the overall innovation landscape.
description: The French government's privatisation programme aimed to enhance market efficiency and corporate governance by selling off state-owned enterprises operating in competitive sectors.
source_quote: Resuming the privatisation plan was one of the priorities of the incoming administration, who in mid-1993 presented a list of firms to be sold and issued a framework law.

growth_orientation_rationale: These measures are designed to stimulate entrepreneurship and business growth, which can enhance economic productivity.
component_name: Tax and Legal Support for SMEs
status_evidence: The measures have been put into effect and are actively supporting small enterprises.
importance_rationale: While significant, these reforms are not structural changes but rather enhancements to existing support mechanisms.
description: The French government implemented measures to encourage the creation and expansion of small and medium-sized enterprises, including tax reductions for investors in small businesses and improved legal treatment for self-employed individuals.
source_quote: The main items in this package include equality of legal treatment between small businesses and companies, the simplification of administrative procedures and improved access to local saving via, for example, tax reductions for people investing in small businesses.

growth_orientation_rationale: These infrastructure improvements enhance connectivity and efficiency, contributing to economic growth.
status_evidence: The reforms have been executed and are operational, enhancing transport services.
importance_rationale: This reform represents a major overhaul of the transport infrastructure, impacting multiple sectors.
description: The French government has initiated significant reforms in the transport sector, including the regrouping of major motorway companies and the development of the TGV network, which has improved rail services and passenger traffic.
source_quote: The introduction of high-speed trains demonstrates the capacity of rail companies to innovate and has improved the quality of rail services by cutting travelling times considerably.

growth_orientation_rationale: These initiatives are designed to enhance access to financing and support for new enterprises, which are critical for innovation and economic growth.
status_evidence: The reforms have been actively in place since their introduction in 1996.
importance_rationale: While these reforms significantly support the startup ecosystem, they do not represent a structural overhaul of the innovation system.
description: The French government has implemented several initiatives to support the startup ecosystem, including the ACCRE programme, which provides financial assistance and social security exemptions for unemployed individuals starting their own businesses. Additionally, guarantees for small and medium-sized enterprises (SMEs) have been substantially increased to facilitate access to credit, and the creation of the New Market in February 1996 aims to improve financing for innovative enterprises by enhancing the liquidity of investments in rapidly expanding SMEs.
source_quote: The ACCRE programme provides financial help to the unemployed who want to become self-employed in addition to an exemption from social security contributions for one year.

growth_orientation_rationale: This initiative aims to increase the supply of capital for innovative firms, thereby fostering entrepreneurship and technological development.
component_name: Fund of Funds for Venture Capital
status_evidence: The fund was established to support venture capital investments.
importance_rationale: This reform represents a significant structural change in the venture capital landscape, aiming to enhance funding for innovative startups and improve the overall investment climate.
description: The government has allocated FF 600 million from the opening-up of France Télécom's capital to a 'fund of funds' aimed at financing minority stakes in private venture capital companies, promoting investment in young technology-based firms.
source_quote: The government has also allocated FF 600 million of the proceeds from the opening-up of the capital of France Télécom to a 'fund of funds' which will finance minority stakes in private venture capital companies.

growth_orientation_rationale: By providing financial support and incentives, this reform encourages the establishment and growth of innovative firms, enhancing the overall innovation ecosystem.
status_evidence: The public venture capital fund has been established to support innovative SMEs.
importance_rationale: This reform is a major step in enhancing the financial support available for innovative SMEs, which is crucial for fostering a vibrant startup ecosystem.
description: A public venture capital fund has been launched to support innovative SMEs, alongside tax incentives for investments in new SMEs, aiming to stimulate entrepreneurship and innovation.
source_quote: A public venture capital fund has been launched. The first 'thematic' research network has been set up in the telecommunications sector to improve the interface between public laboratories, private companies and operators.

growth_orientation_rationale: This initiative aims to reduce youth unemployment by creating job opportunities, thereby enhancing the skills of young workers and contributing to the labor market.
status_evidence: The programme has successfully created over 150,000 jobs by mid-November 1998.
importance_rationale: This programme represents a significant structural change in addressing youth unemployment and skill development, with a large target of job creation.
description: The French government launched the 'New Services, New Jobs' programme to create jobs for young people in emerging sectors not covered by the public or market sectors, subsidizing these positions significantly.
source_quote: The 'New Services, New Jobs' programme aims to encourage the creation of jobs that will fill emerging needs not met by the public sector nor by the market.

growth_orientation_rationale: By targeting funding towards projects with societal benefits, the reform aims to enhance the effectiveness of public investment in innovation, thereby fostering economic growth.
status_evidence: The government has taken measures to reform the Atout programme and increase the repayment rate.
importance_rationale: The reform represents a significant shift in how public funding is allocated, focusing on projects with greater societal relevance, which can lead to improved innovation outcomes.
description: The French government has initiated a reorientation of its incentive appropriations policy to better support research projects that address public objectives and to reduce dead-weight losses associated with funding projects that companies would have undertaken anyway.
source_quote: The government has initiated a reorientation of its incentive appropriations’ policy in 1998.

growth_orientation_rationale: The measures aim to enhance the research environment and incentivize innovation, which can lead to increased productivity and economic growth.
status_evidence: The Prime Minister announced the measures at the Innovation Congress.
importance_rationale: This reform represents a significant shift in the government's approach to fostering innovation through structured support and resources, impacting the entire research and innovation ecosystem.
description: The Prime Minister announces a package of additional measures to promote innovation, including the creation of a national technological research network, a reform of the status of researchers, and an overhaul of the rules applying to stock options.
source_quote: At the Innovation Congress, the Prime Minister announces a package of additional measures to promote innovation, including the creation of a national technological research network.

growth_orientation_rationale: By improving the efficiency of innovation policies, the reforms are expected to stimulate private sector investment and enhance the overall innovative capacity of the economy.
status_evidence: The reforms were announced at the Innovation Congress in May 1998 and have been put into action.
importance_rationale: These reforms represent a significant shift in the approach to innovation policy in France, aiming to address structural issues and enhance the role of market forces in driving innovation.
description: The French government has undertaken ambitious structural reforms to enhance the economic efficiency of technology research and innovation policies, aiming to increase the innovative dynamics of firms by changing incentive systems and promoting technology diffusion.
source_quote: The French government, aware of the growing costs of these rigidities, has undertaken ambitious structural reforms in order to increase the economic efficiency of technology research and innovation policies.

growth_orientation_rationale: By offering financial support to SMEs, the reform aims to stimulate innovation and enhance the competitiveness of smaller firms in the market.
status_evidence: ANVAR authorisations have been provided to SMEs for financing innovative activities.
importance_rationale: While the funding has decreased, the continued support for SMEs is crucial for fostering innovation in the private sector.
description: The National Agency for the Promotion of Research (ANVAR) provides SMEs with preferential loans to finance their innovative activities, although the total authorizations have decreased over the years.
source_quote: The National Agency for the Promotion of Research (ANVAR) provides SMEs with preferential loans to finance their innovative activities.

growth_orientation_rationale: The extension and modification of the RTC is expected to enhance corporate R&D investment, particularly among SMEs and start-ups, thereby fostering innovation and economic growth.
status_evidence: The provisions for the RTC were amended and extended as part of the 1999 Budget Law.
importance_rationale: The reform significantly alters the structure and duration of the RTC, which is a key instrument for stimulating R&D investment in France, particularly for SMEs.
description: The draft 1999 Budget Law amends the provisions for the Research Tax Credit (RTC), extending it for another five years and making it a negotiable claim to assist SMEs in their dealings with banks, while also making it immediately refundable for start-ups during their first three years of business.
source_quote: The draft 1999 Budget Law amends the provisions for the RTC, which has been extended for another five years.

growth_orientation_rationale: These measures are designed to stimulate investment in innovative firms, thereby enhancing their capacity to grow and create jobs.
status_evidence: A series of measures has been implemented since the last Survey to improve technological innovation.
importance_rationale: This reform represents a significant shift in the approach to supporting innovation through financial incentives, addressing previous barriers to venture capital investment.
description: The French authorities have launched a series of measures to improve technological innovation and encourage its diffusion, including tax incentives for life insurance contracts invested in venture capital and for capital gains reinvested in young companies.
source_quote: Important initiatives have been launched to improve technological innovation and encourage diffusion incentives, drawing on the experience of other OECD countries.

growth_orientation_rationale: By facilitating access to capital for innovative firms, this fund is expected to enhance their growth potential and contribute to job creation.
status_evidence: The public venture capital fund has been launched to provide leverage for private venture capital.
importance_rationale: This reform is a major step in addressing the funding gap for innovative startups, which is critical for fostering a vibrant entrepreneurial ecosystem.
description: A public venture capital fund has been launched to provide leverage for private venture capital, aiming to alleviate the scarcity of capital that hampers innovation.
source_quote: A public venture capital fund has been launched, the aim of which is to provide leverage for private venture capital.

growth_orientation_rationale: Increases the availability of venture capital, which is crucial for funding innovative startups and fostering economic growth.
status_evidence: The easing of the regulations for mutual funds investing in innovative companies is being prepared.
importance_rationale: This reform is significant as it aims to enhance the venture capital landscape, which is vital for supporting innovative firms.
description: The easing of regulations for mutual funds investing in innovative companies is expected to boost the supply of venture capital.
source_quote: The supply of venture capital should also be boosted by the easing of the regulations for mutual funds investing in innovative companies.

growth_orientation_rationale: By fostering a more responsive public research sector, the measures are expected to enhance innovation capabilities in the private sector, particularly benefiting small firms.
status_evidence: The measures are described as being implemented to encourage innovation.
importance_rationale: This reform represents a significant shift in the approach to public funding and its responsiveness to economic needs, which is crucial for enhancing innovation in the private sector.
description: The French government is implementing measures to create a more responsive public research sector and funding system for industrial research, aimed at promoting innovation in the private sector, particularly among small firms.
source_quote: The object of these measures is, firstly, to create the climate for a public research sector and a public funding system for industrial research that is more responsive to the needs of the economy and to public demand.

growth_orientation_rationale: These networks are designed to enhance collaboration between public and private sectors, which can lead to increased innovation and commercialization of research findings.
status_evidence: The government is setting up networks linking public laboratories and enterprises.
importance_rationale: This initiative represents a significant effort to enhance collaboration between public and private sectors, which is essential for fostering innovation.
description: The French government is establishing networks linking public laboratories and enterprises, including SMEs, to facilitate collaboration and enhance public research funding.
source_quote: The French government is setting up networks linking public laboratories and enterprises, including SMEs, in well-defined fields, which will receive a share of public research funding.

growth_orientation_rationale: The modernization of health systems through technology is expected to enhance efficiency and reduce costs, contributing positively to the economy.
status_evidence: By mid-1999, 35 million insured households should have received the Sesam-Vitale chip card.
importance_rationale: This reform represents a significant step towards digitizing health services, which can lead to improved service delivery and cost savings.
description: The French government is implementing the Sesam-Vitale chip card system to replace paper social security cards, facilitating electronic transmittal of social security forms and improving efficiency in health reimbursements.
source_quote: By mid-1999, 35 million insured households should have received the Sesam-Vitale chip card, which is meant to replace the paper social security card.

growth_orientation_rationale: By reducing labor costs, the reform is expected to enhance employment opportunities and stimulate economic activity.
status_evidence: The reform is designed to reduce labor costs and has been announced as part of the government's fiscal strategy.
importance_rationale: The reform represents a significant adjustment in tax policy aimed at reducing labor costs, which is expected to have a meaningful impact on employment.
description: The 1999 reform of the taxe professionnelle aims to phase out the wage share of the tax base, which is expected to reduce labor costs significantly and create approximately 20,000 jobs in 2000.
source_quote: The 1999 reform of the taxe professionnelle, designed to phase out the wage share of the tax base, is reducing labour cost.

growth_orientation_rationale: By lowering the cost of domestic services, the reform encourages formal employment and job creation in the sector.
status_evidence: The reform has been applied since the end of 1999 to promote job creation in domestic services.
importance_rationale: This reform is a significant policy change aimed at enhancing employment in the domestic services sector, with expected positive economic impacts.
description: The application of a reduced rate of VAT for domestic work and home services, initiated at the end of 1999, is expected to create several thousand jobs and reduce unrecorded employment.
source_quote: The application of the reduced rate of VAT for domestic work and home services to individuals since the end of 1999 should permit the creation of several thousand jobs.

growth_orientation_rationale: By linking budget resources to performance outcomes, the initiative aims to improve efficiency and productivity in the public sector, which can positively impact overall economic growth.
status_evidence: The pilot experiments with performance contracts were initiated in 1999.
importance_rationale: The introduction of performance contracts represents a significant shift towards a more results-oriented public sector management approach, which can lead to improved efficiency and effectiveness in government operations.
description: In 1999, France initiated pilot experiments with performance contracts aimed at enhancing public sector efficiency. These contracts allow government agencies to manage budgetary appropriations flexibly while committing to performance targets defined by public service user expectations.
source_quote: In France, an approach of this type was initiated in 1999, in the form of pilot experiments with performance contracts.

growth_orientation_rationale: Facilitates technology transfer and enhances collaboration between sectors, which can lead to increased innovation and productivity.
status_evidence: The law was enacted to streamline support for research and innovation.
importance_rationale: This law represents a significant structural change in the innovation landscape, aiming to enhance collaboration and technology transfer, which are crucial for economic growth.
description: The law on innovation and research of 12 July 1999 aims to encourage the transfer of technology from the public research sector to the private sector and the creation of innovative companies. It includes measures for researcher mobility, collaboration between public and corporate research, and adjustments to the tax and legal framework for innovative enterprises.
source_quote: The law on innovation and research of 12 July 1999 should encourage the transfer of technology from the public research sector to the private sector, and the creation of innovative companies.

growth_orientation_rationale: The ecological taxes are designed to fund environmental initiatives, which can lead to innovation in sustainable practices and technologies.
status_evidence: The ecological taxes have been enacted and are currently in effect.
importance_rationale: The introduction of ecological taxes represents a significant policy change aimed at environmental sustainability.
description: In 1999, France introduced two ecological taxes aimed at reducing water pollution, which are part of the General Tax on Polluting Activities (TGAP). These taxes target detergent phosphates and agricultural pesticides, with revenues intended to support environmental initiatives.
source_quote: In 1999, two ecological taxes aimed at reducing water pollution were created and included in the General Tax on Polluting Activities (TGAP).

growth_orientation_rationale: Enhancing IT skills among students is expected to improve human capital, which is crucial for future innovation and productivity.
status_evidence: The government has announced its intention to introduce IT and Internet courses for all students in teacher training colleges.
importance_rationale: This initiative represents a significant effort to integrate technology into education, which can have lasting impacts on the skill development of future generations.
description: The French government aims to modernize the education system by equipping schools with computers and improving internet access, targeting a reduction in the average number of pupils per microcomputer by the year 2000.
source_quote: The government has also announced that it intends to introduce IT and Internet courses for all students in teacher training colleges for the next school year.

growth_orientation_rationale: By reducing working hours, the initiative is expected to create jobs and enhance productivity, thereby supporting economic growth.
status_evidence: The law was enacted and began to take effect on 1 February 2000.
importance_rationale: This reform represents a significant structural change in labor policy aimed at improving employment rates and productivity across various sectors.
description: The French government introduced the 35-hour workweek law, which aims to reduce working hours for employees in order to create jobs and improve productivity.
source_quote: The law set the statutory working week at 35 hours on 1 January 2000 for enterprises with more than 20 employees.

growth_orientation_rationale: By reducing administrative burdens, the reform aims to foster entrepreneurship and facilitate the creation of new businesses, which can enhance economic growth.
status_evidence: The government is continuing its policy of simplifying legislation and reducing administrative formalities.
importance_rationale: This reform represents a significant structural change aimed at improving the entrepreneurial climate, which is crucial for economic recovery and growth.
description: The French government is continuing its policy of simplifying legislation and reducing administrative formalities for small businesses, which includes tax exemptions and the creation of an Internet portal for business registration.
source_quote: The government’s policy of simplifying legislation and reducing administrative formalities... is being continued in 2000 with a further wave of taxes being scrapped.

growth_orientation_rationale: These measures aim to lower the barriers to entry for new businesses, thereby encouraging entrepreneurship and innovation.
status_evidence: In April 2000 the authorities announced a new set of measures to facilitate starting a business.
importance_rationale: While significant, these measures are part of a broader initiative to improve the business environment rather than a standalone major reform.
description: The French authorities announced a new set of measures to facilitate starting a business, including the abolition of registration taxes and the creation of an Internet portal for entrepreneurs.
source_quote: In April 2000 the authorities announced a new set of measures to facilitate starting a business.

growth_orientation_rationale: By facilitating investment in innovative firms, this reform is expected to enhance the availability of capital for startups and promote innovation.
status_evidence: The regulations have been improved to allow investment in any innovative firm.
importance_rationale: This reform represents a significant change in the regulatory framework for investment in innovation, potentially increasing funding for innovative companies.
description: The regulations for mutual funds investing in innovative companies have been improved, allowing these funds to invest in any company approved by the National Agency for the Promotion of Research (ANVAR), thus enhancing financial support for innovative firms.
source_quote: The FCPI regulations have been improved to allow investment in any innovative firm.

growth_orientation_rationale: By simplifying the incorporation process for innovative firms, this reform encourages entrepreneurship and the establishment of new businesses.
status_evidence: The regulations applicable to simplified joint stock companies were extended to allow any innovative firm to incorporate.
importance_rationale: This reform significantly eases the process for innovative firms to establish themselves, which is crucial for fostering a vibrant startup ecosystem.
description: The legal framework for simplified joint stock companies has been extended to allow any innovative firm to incorporate as a simplified joint stock company, facilitating easier business formation.
source_quote: The regulations applicable to simplified joint stock companies were extended to allow any innovative firm to incorporate.

growth_orientation_rationale: This law is expected to stimulate R&D activities and foster collaboration between public and private sectors, enhancing overall innovation capacity.
status_evidence: The law was officially published and is in effect.
importance_rationale: This law represents a significant overhaul of the innovation and research landscape in France, aiming to create a more conducive environment for R&D and collaboration.
description: The French government enacted the 'Loi sur l'innovation et la recherche', which aims to enhance the framework for innovation and research activities in the country.
source_quote: Ministère de l'Éducation nationale, de la Recherche et de la Technologie (2000), La loi sur l'innovation et la recherche.

growth_orientation_rationale: Facilitates the creation of new technology firms, enhancing innovation and economic dynamism.
status_evidence: The bill was adopted by the Council of Ministers.
importance_rationale: This reform represents a significant structural change in how government researchers interact with the business sector, promoting innovation and enterprise creation.
description: The Council of Ministers adopted a bill on innovation aimed at encouraging enterprise creation by government researchers and simplifying interactions between research bodies and businesses.
source_quote: The Council of Ministers adopts the bill on innovation, which is designed to encourage enterprise creation by government researchers and to simplify relations between research bodies and the world of business.

growth_orientation_rationale: These measures are intended to stimulate the establishment of new technology firms, which can drive innovation and economic growth.
status_evidence: The government announces the launch of a set of measures, worth FF 200 million, designed to facilitate the creation of technology firms.
importance_rationale: While significant, these measures are part of a broader strategy and do not represent a complete overhaul of the innovation system.
description: The government announced a set of measures worth FF 200 million to facilitate the creation of technology firms.
source_quote: The government announces the launch of a set of measures, worth FF 200 million, designed to facilitate the creation of technology firms.

growth_orientation_rationale: The elimination of taxes and provision of credits are expected to incentivize new enterprise creation, fostering innovation and economic growth.
status_evidence: The measures have been put into effect as part of the government's support for enterprise creation.
importance_rationale: The measures represent a significant but not structural change in supporting enterprise creation.
description: The government announced measures to support enterprise creation, including the elimination of all state taxes on enterprise creation and the provision of new credits for enterprises in new technology and proximity areas.
source_quote: The Prime Minister announces measures to support enterprise creation: all state taxes on enterprise creation are eliminated; new credits will be provided to enterprises working in the new technology and proximity areas.

growth_orientation_rationale: By providing financial incentives for renewable energy production, the feed-in tariffs encourage investment in clean technologies, which can lead to increased innovation and job creation in the sector.
status_evidence: Feed-in tariffs were first introduced in 2001-02 for electricity generation technologies.
importance_rationale: The introduction of feed-in tariffs represents a significant structural change in France's energy policy, aimed at fostering the growth of renewable energy sources and reducing reliance on fossil fuels.
description: The French government has implemented feed-in tariffs to promote renewable energy, ensuring that electricity producers can at least break even on their investments. These tariffs are set above market prices for various renewable energy sources, including solar and wind, to encourage the development of these technologies.
source_quote: Feed-in tariffs were first introduced in 2001-02 for electricity generation technologies that make use of solar, wind, tidal wave, geothermal and hydro energy.

growth_orientation_rationale: Investing in hospital infrastructure is expected to enhance healthcare delivery and innovation in medical services.
status_evidence: The reform has been successfully implemented.
importance_rationale: This reform involves a substantial financial commitment to improve healthcare infrastructure.
