description: The Ministry of Health introduced the 'Le plan Hôpital 2007' reform, which includes additional investment funds of €6 billion to improve the physical plant and materials in the hospital sector, overseen by a national agency.
source_quote: At the end of 2002, the Ministry of Health introduced a reform of the hospital sector (Le plan Hôpital 2007). This programme proposed a number of measures aimed at rectifying a number of these problems in the hospital sector.

growth_orientation_rationale: The reforms aim to increase R&D spending and improve resource allocation, which are expected to enhance innovation and productivity.
component_name: National Science Fund and Research and Technology Fund
status_evidence: The National Science Fund and Research and Technology Fund have been established and are operational.
importance_rationale: The creation of national funds and a comprehensive innovation plan represent significant structural changes in R&D funding.
description: The recent creation of the National Science Fund and the Research and Technology Fund aims to enhance the responsiveness of public-sector research to business and societal needs by improving the allocation of resources between programmes and research areas. Additionally, the 'Innovation Plan' announced in April 2003 aims to increase total R&D spending from 2.2% of GDP to 3% by 2010, with a focus on boosting private sector R&D investment.
source_quote: The 'Innovation Plan' announced in April 2003 hopes to raise total Research and Development (R&D) spending from its current level of 2.2 per cent of GDP to 3 per cent by 2010.

growth_orientation_rationale: These tax incentives are designed to stimulate R&D investment among startups, thereby fostering innovation and economic growth.
status_evidence: The measures have been announced but may not yet be fully implemented.
importance_rationale: The introduction of significant tax exemptions for innovative firms represents a major reform in innovation policy.
description: The government has introduced measures to exonerate young and innovative firms from corporate income tax for their first three profitable years and provide various tax exemptions to encourage R&D investments.
source_quote: The creation and survival of young and innovative firms include exonerating such enterprises from corporate income tax for their first three profitable years.

growth_orientation_rationale: The establishment of a collaborative network is expected to enhance innovation through improved partnerships between industry and research.
status_evidence: The measures have been put into practice and are operational.
importance_rationale: While significant, the measures represent a narrower reform compared to larger funding initiatives.
description: France has introduced measures to increase incentives for innovation, including the establishment of a network of industrialists and research laboratories to foster collaboration.
source_quote: Efforts to stimulate R&D. Measure have been undertaken to increase incentives for innovation, including the establishment of network of industrialists and research laboratories.

growth_orientation_rationale: Reducing tax burdens on labor-intensive companies is expected to encourage innovation and job creation.
status_evidence: The reform has been successfully implemented.
importance_rationale: This reform represents a significant overhaul of the local business tax system.
description: The local business tax, taxe professionnelle, has undergone significant changes to alleviate burdens on labor-intensive companies, including the gradual removal of the payroll-related part of the tax and the introduction of a ceiling on the tax based on value added.
source_quote: The payroll-related part of the tax was gradually removed and local government was compensated by transfers from central government funds.

growth_orientation_rationale: By promoting collaboration and innovation within clusters, the initiative aims to boost productivity and competitiveness in various sectors.
status_evidence: The programme of competitiveness clusters was launched in 2004 and has been actively supported since.
importance_rationale: This initiative represents a structural change in how innovation is fostered in France, aiming to create synergies between various stakeholders in the economy.
description: The French government has launched a programme of 'competitiveness clusters' to enhance innovation and regional development by fostering collaboration among firms, research centres, and educational institutions.
source_quote: In 2004, the authorities launched an ambitious programme of 'competitiveness clusters' (pôles de compétitivité), which aims at promoting clusters.

growth_orientation_rationale: By providing financial support to innovative young businesses, the subsidy encourages R&D investment and fosters the growth of high-tech sectors, which can enhance overall economic productivity.
status_evidence: The subsidy has been in place since 2004 and is designed to run for ten years.
importance_rationale: This subsidy represents a significant effort to support the growth of innovative young firms, which are crucial for technological advancement and economic dynamism.
description: The 'Aid for Projects of Innovative Young Businesses' subsidy was introduced to support high-tech SMEs through tax exemptions, targeting innovative young enterprises that are R&D intensive.
source_quote: The 'Aid for Projects of Innovative Young Businesses' subsidy... is designed to foster the growth and development of high-tech SMEs through different tax exemptions.

growth_orientation_rationale: The initiative aims to enhance the employability of older workers, thereby increasing their participation in the labor market and contributing to overall economic productivity.
component_name: Employment Rate Initiative for Older Workers
status_evidence: The government announced the plan and initiated measures to support older workers.
importance_rationale: The plan represents a significant effort to address demographic challenges in the labor market, focusing on a specific age group and introducing new employment contracts.
description: The government announced the Plan d’action concerté pour l’emploi senior, aiming to increase the employment rate of 55-64 year-olds to 50% by 2010 through various measures, including the introduction of a short-term employment contract for older workers.
source_quote: The government announced the Plan d’action concerté pour l’emploi senior which aims to increase the employment rate of 55-64 year-olds to 50% from the current 37%, by 2010.

growth_orientation_rationale: By improving budgetary processes and accountability, the reform aims to enhance the efficiency of public spending, potentially leading to better economic outcomes.
status_evidence: The LOLF first came into full force in 2006.
importance_rationale: The LOLF represents a structural change in how public finances are managed, aiming for greater efficiency and accountability, which is crucial for fiscal sustainability.
description: The adoption of the State Finance Framework Law (LOLF) introduced mechanisms to improve the utilization of budgeted resources, enhancing accountability and transparency in public spending.
source_quote: The main contribution of the LOLF was to introduce mechanisms to improve the utilisation of budgeted resources.

growth_orientation_rationale: Improving internet access is expected to enhance productivity and innovation capabilities in underserved areas.
status_evidence: The initiative was announced with a target implementation year.
importance_rationale: While significant, the reform focuses on infrastructure rather than a broad systemic change.
description: The French government aims to enable high-speed Internet access in all municipalities by 2007, providing financial aid to ensure coverage in areas lacking such access.
source_quote: The government has an objective of enabling high speed Internet access in all French municipalities by 2007, which has led the government to provide financial aid to secure coverage for the large number of municipalities without high speed Internet access.

growth_orientation_rationale: By increasing competitive funding for research, the agency aims to stimulate high-quality research outputs, which can lead to innovation and economic growth.
status_evidence: The agency was established in 2007 and has been operational since then.
importance_rationale: The establishment of the National Research Agency represents a significant reform in the governance of public R&D funding, aiming to improve the effectiveness and efficiency of research investments.
description: The National Research Agency was created to provide competitive funding for research projects, aiming to enhance the quality and transparency of public R&D financing.
source_quote: The creation in January 2007 of the National Research Agency... opened another channel of public financing for research projects.

growth_orientation_rationale: By increasing autonomy, universities can better manage resources and respond to market needs, potentially leading to improved educational outcomes and innovation.
status_evidence: The law was promulgated in August 2007 and has been adopted by several universities.
importance_rationale: This reform significantly alters the governance structure of universities, which can lead to improved efficiency and responsiveness in higher education.
description: The Universities Freedom and Responsibility Act was enacted to grant greater autonomy to French universities, enhancing their governance and financial management.
source_quote: The Universities Freedom and Responsibility Act... lays the groundwork for greater autonomy for French universities.

growth_orientation_rationale: This reform incentivizes private investment in SMEs, enhancing their capital base and growth potential, which can lead to increased innovation and job creation.
status_evidence: The tax measures raised nearly EUR 1 billion for investment in SMEs.
importance_rationale: This reform significantly enhances the financial incentives for private investment in SMEs, which is crucial for their growth and innovation capacity.
description: The Law to Promote Work, Employment and Purchasing Power introduced a new tax advantage allowing ISF taxpayers to reduce their tax liability by investing in SMEs, raising nearly EUR 1 billion for investment in these firms in its first year.
source_quote: The Law to Promote Work, Employment and Purchasing Power instituted a new tax advantage allowing ISF taxpayers to reduce their tax liability by subscribing directly to the capital of SMEs.

growth_orientation_rationale: By providing generous tax incentives, the reform encourages firms to increase their investment in research and development, which can lead to greater innovation and economic growth.
status_evidence: The 2008 reform simplified its use considerably and increased its visibility.
importance_rationale: This reform significantly enhances the attractiveness of the research tax credit, potentially leading to a substantial increase in private sector R&D investment.
description: The 2008 reform of the research tax credit simplified its use and increased its visibility, making it one of the most generous incentives in the OECD. This reform aims to enhance private sector research efforts by providing substantial tax relief.
source_quote: The 2008 reform simplified its use considerably and increased its visibility, but at the same time it made it one of the most generous incentives anywhere in the OECD.

growth_orientation_rationale: Streamlining export assistance through Ubifrance is expected to enhance the efficiency of support for businesses, thereby promoting innovation and competitiveness.
status_evidence: The reform was launched in February 2008 to enhance Ubifrance's role.
importance_rationale: This reform represents a significant change in the structure of export assistance, aiming to improve coordination and effectiveness in supporting international business development.
description: A reform was launched to make Ubifrance the centerpiece of a government mechanism to support international business development, establishing a framework for partnership with consular networks and enhancing its role in economic missions.
source_quote: Launched in February 2008, one reform made Ubifrance the centerpiece of a government mechanism to support international business development.

growth_orientation_rationale: By consolidating support mechanisms for SMEs, the programme aims to enhance their international competitiveness and innovation capacity.
status_evidence: The CapExport programme was reformulated in 2008 to better support SMEs.
importance_rationale: The reform of the CapExport programme represents a significant enhancement of existing support for SMEs, aiming to improve their export capabilities and innovation.
description: The 'CapExport' programme bundles various types of assistance for entering new markets, which was reformulated in 2008 to enhance support for SMEs in their export efforts.
source_quote: The CapExport programme... was reformulated in 2008.

growth_orientation_rationale: By increasing the tax credit rate and eliminating ceilings, the reform incentivizes firms to invest more in R&D, which can enhance innovation and productivity.
status_evidence: The changes to the research tax credit have been enacted and are in effect.
importance_rationale: This reform represents a significant overhaul of the tax credit system, aimed at enhancing R&D investment across all sectors, which is crucial for long-term economic growth.
description: The French government has restructured the research tax credit to broaden its scope and increase the tax relief available for R&D expenditures, making France more attractive for R&D investment.
source_quote: The amendment completely eliminated the portion calculated on the basis of incremental spending, it raised the tax credit rate applicable to the volume of expenditure significantly, and it eliminated the ceiling.

growth_orientation_rationale: By enhancing access to venture capital for early-stage start-ups, this reform supports innovation and entrepreneurship, which are vital for economic growth.
status_evidence: The authorities took steps to modernize venture-capital instruments.
importance_rationale: This reform significantly improves the landscape for venture capital, which is crucial for fostering innovation and supporting start-ups.
description: The Economic Modernisation Act modernized venture-capital instruments by creating specialized funds that invest in early-stage start-ups and simplifying existing EU-level venture-capital measures.
source_quote: The LME took steps to modernise venture-capital instruments, by creating specialised funds that invest in unlisted 'early-stage' start-ups.

growth_orientation_rationale: This measure directly supports innovative SMEs by providing them with guaranteed access to government contracts, which can enhance their market presence and growth.
status_evidence: The LME instituted the principle whereby governments at all levels are authorised to reserve 15% of their so-called 'technology' purchases for innovative SMEs.
importance_rationale: This reform is significant as it creates a dedicated market for innovative SMEs, enhancing their growth potential and encouraging innovation.
description: The Economic Modernisation Act allows governments to reserve 15% of technology purchases for innovative SMEs, aiming to enhance their growth and innovation.
source_quote: The LME instituted the principle whereby governments at all levels are authorised to reserve 15% of their so-called 'technology' purchases for innovative SMEs.

growth_orientation_rationale: Investing in infrastructure is crucial for improving the quality of education and research capabilities, which can lead to enhanced innovation.
status_evidence: The initiative has been executed as part of the government's commitment to enhance higher education.
importance_rationale: The initiative represents a significant investment in the physical infrastructure of higher education.
description: The French government launched the 'Plan Campus' initiative with a funding of EUR 5 billion aimed at renovating campus buildings and enhancing the infrastructure of higher education institutions.
source_quote: The Plan Campus, launched at the end of 2008 with funding of EUR 5 billion, covers the renovation of campus buildings.

growth_orientation_rationale: By increasing support for R&D, the initiative is expected to enhance productivity and innovation, leading to economic growth.
status_evidence: The government has committed to increasing incentives for innovation.
importance_rationale: This reform represents a significant shift in policy aimed at enhancing the innovation landscape in France, which is crucial for long-term economic competitiveness.
description: The French government aims to increase incentives to promote innovation, focusing on enhancing the competitiveness of firms through improved research and development support.
source_quote: Increase incentives to promote innovation.

growth_orientation_rationale: By providing venture capital, the fund aims to stimulate innovation and support the growth of domestic firms, enhancing their competitiveness.
status_evidence: The fund has been established and is operational.
importance_rationale: The establishment of a strategic investment fund represents a significant structural change aimed at enhancing the innovation ecosystem and protecting key industries.
description: The French government created a strategic investment fund to provide venture capital to innovative firms and prevent foreign takeovers in strategic sectors.
source_quote: The government has created a strategic investment fund to provide venture capital to innovative firms and to forestall foreign takeovers of French firms in sectors that are deemed 'strategic'.

growth_orientation_rationale: The plan aims to boost public investment, which can enhance infrastructure and stimulate economic activity, thereby supporting growth.
status_evidence: The economic recovery plan was approved and measures were put into effect.
importance_rationale: This reform represents a significant structural response to the economic crisis, aiming to revitalize public investment and support SMEs, which are crucial for economic recovery.
description: The French government adopted an economic recovery plan amounting to 1.3% of GDP, which included measures to stimulate public investment and support SMEs, particularly in the context of the economic downturn.
source_quote: The economic recovery plan announced at the beginning of December 2008 contained a series of measures totalling EUR 26 billion, or around 1.3% of GDP.

growth_orientation_rationale: By reducing the risk for landlords, the scheme encourages them to rent to low-income households, thereby increasing housing supply and mobility in the market.
status_evidence: The scheme was reformed and extended in January 2010.
importance_rationale: The reform significantly enhances access to housing for low-income households, addressing a critical barrier in the housing market.
description: The Garantie des Risques Locatifs (Tenancy Guarantee Scheme) was established to facilitate access to private-sector housing for low-income households by insuring landlords against tenant default risks. The scheme was reformed in January 2010 to expand eligibility to all tenants with an effort ratio of 50% or lower, regardless of their profile.
source_quote: The Garantie des Risques Locatifs (Tenancy Guarantee Scheme –GRL), which was established under the impetus of the social partners, is aimed at making it easier for low-income households to access private-sector housing stock in areas of excess demand by insuring landlords against the risk of tenant default.

growth_orientation_rationale: By incentivizing R&D investment, the reform aims to boost innovation and productivity in the private sector.
status_evidence: The research tax credit was increased as part of the government's measures.
importance_rationale: The increase in the research tax credit is a significant measure aimed at enhancing R&D investment, which is crucial for innovation.
description: The French government increased the research tax credit to enhance R&D investment, although it requires further review to prevent potential abuses.
source_quote: The government is increasing the research tax credit, although this provision should be reviewed in order to correct possible abuses.

growth_orientation_rationale: Investing in higher education and research is expected to enhance the skill level of the workforce, leading to increased innovation and productivity.
component_name: Investment in Higher Education and Research
status_evidence: The government is investing in higher education and research as part of its recovery plan.
importance_rationale: This investment is significant for enhancing the quality of education and research, which is vital for long-term economic growth.
description: The French government is investing in higher education, training, and research to create top-ranked universities as part of its broader economic recovery strategy.
source_quote: The government is investing in higher education, training and research with a view to creating top-ranked universities.

growth_orientation_rationale: Enhances collaboration between educational institutions and promotes research capabilities, which can lead to innovation and economic growth.
status_evidence: Four advanced R&D centres were created in 2009 and three in 2010.
importance_rationale: The creation of R&D centres represents a significant step towards enhancing research collaboration and infrastructure, which is crucial for innovation.
description: The establishment of advanced R&D centres (Pôles de recherche et d’enseignement supérieur, PRES) initiated closer cooperation between grandes écoles and universities, with four created in 2009 and three in 2010, totaling 18, supported by 'centres of excellence' as part of 'investments for the future'.
source_quote: The establishment of advanced R&D centres (Pôles de recherche et d’enseignement supérieur, PRES), which initiated closer co-operation between the grandes écoles and the universities in 2007, is continuing.

growth_orientation_rationale: By providing substantial tax incentives for R&D, the credit encourages private sector investment in innovation, which can enhance productivity and economic growth.
status_evidence: The research tax credit was evaluated and recommended for stability until at least 2013.
importance_rationale: The evaluation and recommendation for stability of the research tax credit reflect its significant role in supporting R&D investment in the private sector.
description: The research tax credit, one of the most generous R&D support mechanisms globally, was evaluated in 2010, confirming its leverage effect on private expenditure and recommending its stability until at least 2013.
source_quote: The research tax credit, with a tax expenditure of EUR4.5 billion in 2010 and 2.1 billion projected for 2011, is one of the most generous R&D support mechanisms in the world.

growth_orientation_rationale: This substantial funding is aimed at enhancing research capabilities and fostering innovation through targeted investments.
package_name: Future Investment in Education and Research
status_evidence: The programme has been actively funded and implemented as part of the government's strategy.
importance_rationale: The programme represents a major commitment to funding research and education.
description: The 'investing in the future' programme allocates EUR 35 billion over 10 years to benefit the higher education and research sector, with a significant portion directed towards 'clusters of excellence'.
source_quote: About two-thirds of the 2010 'investing in the future' programme, with total funding of 35 billion over 10 years, will benefit the higher education and research sector.

growth_orientation_rationale: Increased R&D tax credits incentivize private sector investment in research, which can lead to higher productivity and innovation.
status_evidence: The government has taken actions to increase research tax credits.
importance_rationale: The increase in research tax credits represents a significant policy adjustment aimed at enhancing R&D investment, which is crucial for long-term economic growth.
description: France has increased research tax credits to bolster R&D activities, aiming to enhance the economy's supply potential and stimulate innovation.
source_quote: Measures include increased research tax credits to bolster R&D activities.

growth_orientation_rationale: Reducing inefficient tax expenditures can increase government revenues and improve the allocation of resources, potentially enhancing overall economic efficiency.
status_evidence: The government has committed to specific cuts in tax expenditures for the years 2011-2014.
importance_rationale: This reform represents a significant structural change in the approach to tax expenditures, aiming to enhance fiscal sustainability and efficiency in public finances.
description: The French government committed to a EUR11 billion cut in tax expenditures for 2011 and annual cuts of EUR3 billion for 2012-14, aiming to improve fiscal sustainability and reduce inefficiencies in the tax system.
source_quote: The government has committed to a EUR11 billion cut in tax expenditures for 2011 and annual cuts of EUR3 billion for 2012-14.

growth_orientation_rationale: This initiative is expected to enhance consumer awareness and drive demand for environmentally friendly products, potentially leading to innovation in sustainable product design.
status_evidence: A trial period will be launched in July 2011.
importance_rationale: This reform represents a significant shift towards transparency in environmental impacts, which can influence consumer behavior and promote innovation in product development.
description: The Grenelle laws mandate the obligatory display of the environmental impact of consumer products, aiming to cover all products across sectors, with a trial period starting in July 2011.
source_quote: The Grenelle laws set the ambitious goal of requiring an obligatory displaying of the over-the-lifecycle environmental impact of consumer products.

growth_orientation_rationale: The reforms aim to enhance flexibility and innovation in the labour market, which can lead to increased productivity and economic growth.
package_name: Labour Market and Innovation Clusters Reform
status_evidence: The reforms have been put into effect as part of the government's strategy.
importance_rationale: The reforms represent significant structural changes in the labour market and innovation ecosystem.
description: The French government is reforming the labour market to provide employees with new rights and employers with greater flexibility, including the possibility to negotiate firm-level agreements. Additionally, the 2012 National Pact for Growth, Competitiveness and Employment distinguishes internationally oriented strategic clusters from those dedicated to regional development, evaluating projects based on their economic outcomes and innovation diffusion.
source_quote: The 2012 National Pact for Growth, Competitiveness and Employment includes a commitment to distinguish the internationally oriented strategic clusters from those dedicated to regional development.

growth_orientation_rationale: These initiatives are designed to improve the skills and employability of youth, which is essential for long-term economic growth.
package_name: Youth Employment and Higher Education Reform
status_evidence: The programmes have been actively rolled out as part of the government's employment strategy.
importance_rationale: The reforms significantly impact youth employment and the funding structure of higher education.
description: The French government launched a programme of over 150,000 non-work-study wage-subsidised contracts aimed at improving youth employment through long-duration contracts. Additionally, there is an initiative to shift public funding for higher education towards universities to enhance their autonomy and financial resources.
source_quote: The government has launched a new programme of over 150,000 non-work-study wage-subsidised contracts in 2013 and 2014.

growth_orientation_rationale: The focus on competitiveness and the transition to private financing are expected to enhance innovation and productivity.
status_evidence: The reform has been in place since 2013 and is currently operational.
importance_rationale: This reform represents a significant shift in how state aid is provided to competitiveness clusters, emphasizing results and private financing.
description: The new 'competitiveness clusters' phase (2013-18) includes a target for assessment between year-end 2015 and early 2018, with state aid contingent on results and gradually replaced by private financing.
source_quote: The new 'competitiveness clusters' phase (2013-18) includes a target for assessment between year-end 2015 and early 2018.

growth_orientation_rationale: The assessment of innovation policy is expected to improve the effectiveness of R&D funding and support.
status_evidence: The reports and board have been established and are operational.
importance_rationale: While significant, the reforms are more about assessment and reporting rather than direct funding changes.
description: A university impact study and a report on the research tax credit (CIR) were published in 2014, and a board to assess innovation policy was instituted.
source_quote: A university impact study and a report on the CIR were published in 2014.

growth_orientation_rationale: The reforms aim to enhance collaboration and reduce barriers, which can lead to increased innovation and competitiveness.
status_evidence: The law has been enacted and is currently in force.
importance_rationale: The reforms represent a significant structural change in the approach to innovation policy in France.
description: The 2015 law on growth, activity and equal opportunities aims to improve the competitive environment by reducing barriers to entry and enhancing public-private collaboration in innovation. Additionally, the programme d’investissements d’avenir is designed to support this collaboration and entrepreneurship, emphasizing thematic objectives and evaluation to align research activities with national priorities.
source_quote: The 2015 law on growth, activity and equal opportunities improved the competitive environment in a number of areas.

growth_orientation_rationale: The youth guarantee aims to improve employability and skills, while the support for startups is intended to enhance productivity and innovation.
status_evidence: The youth guarantee program is set to be gradually introduced by 2017, and the startup support measures have been announced.
importance_rationale: Both components represent significant policy changes aimed at improving human capital and supporting the startup ecosystem.
description: The French government is implementing a 'youth guarantee' program aimed at providing 18-25 year-olds in precarious situations with guaranteed income and work experience through individualized coaching and alternating periods of work and training. Additionally, plans have been announced to streamline administrative procedures and increase funding opportunities for innovative start-up businesses, aiming to enhance productivity and growth.
source_quote: Streamlining administrative procedures, including the tax system and government support, as well as increasing funding opportunities for innovative start-up businesses, together with improving public procurement practices, would allow substantial productivity gains and growth.

growth_orientation_rationale: The fund aims to enhance innovation capacity in high-tech sectors, which can lead to increased productivity and economic growth.
status_evidence: The fund was set up to provide funding for deep tech innovations.
importance_rationale: The establishment of the FII represents a significant structural change in funding innovation, targeting high-tech sectors and societal challenges, which is crucial for long-term economic growth.
description: A new innovation fund (Fonds pour l’innovation et l’industrie, FII) was established in 2018 to provide funding for deep tech innovations, supporting start-ups in high-tech capital-intensive sectors and funding disruptive innovation projects that address societal challenges.
source_quote: A new innovation fund (Fonds pour l’innovation et l’industrie, FII) has been set up in 2018 to provide funding for deep tech innovations.

growth_orientation_rationale: The fund aims to enhance R&D investment in radical innovations, which can lead to increased productivity and economic growth.
component_name: Fonds pour l’innovation et la rupture
status_evidence: The fund was established to support radical technological innovation.
importance_rationale: The establishment of a dedicated fund for radical innovation represents a significant shift in France's approach to fostering high-impact R&D, which is crucial for long-term economic competitiveness.
description: France created a specific investment fund for supporting radical technological innovation, known as the Fonds pour l’innovation et la rupture (FII), in 2018.
source_quote: Moreover, a specific investment fund for supporting radical technological innovation (Fonds pour l’innovation et la rupture, FII) was created in 2018.

growth_orientation_rationale: By enhancing the skills of less qualified individuals, the plan aims to improve their employability and productivity, contributing positively to economic growth.
status_evidence: The plan is actively being rolled out with regional commitments.
importance_rationale: This substantial investment in human capital is expected to have a long-term impact on the workforce's skills and employability, addressing critical gaps in the labor market.
description: The French government has launched the skills investment plan (Plan d’investissement dans les compétences—PIC), allocating EUR 15 billion to improve access to long courses and personal guidance for less qualified young people and jobseekers from 2018 to 2022.
source_quote: Under the skills investment plan (Plan d’investissement dans les compétences—PIC), EUR 15 billion will be spent on improving their access to long courses providing qualifications and providing personal guidance between 2018 and 2022.

growth_orientation_rationale: By improving apprenticeship schemes, the reform is expected to enhance the skills of the workforce, thereby supporting innovation and productivity in the economy.
status_evidence: The law was enacted in 2018, establishing the new framework for apprenticeships.
importance_rationale: This reform represents a significant structural change in the management of apprenticeships, aiming to improve the quality and accessibility of vocational training, which is crucial for addressing skills shortages in the labor market.
description: The 2018 apprenticeship reform introduced a new operator, France Compétences, to manage apprenticeships, shifting responsibility from regional governments. This reform aims to enhance the attractiveness of apprenticeships through simplified procedures and increased financial support for apprentices.
source_quote: The 2018 law 'Loi pour la liberté de choisir son avenir professionnel' entrusted a new operator—France Compétences—and the professional branches with responsibility for apprenticeship.

growth_orientation_rationale: The GPI aims to enhance public investment efficiency, which can lead to increased productivity and innovation in various sectors, thereby supporting economic growth.
status_evidence: The GPI has been operational since 2018 and includes mechanisms for annual appraisal and adjustment.
importance_rationale: The GPI represents a significant structural change in public investment strategy, integrating multiple priorities and substantial funding aimed at fostering innovation and sustainability.
description: The Grand plan d’investissement (GPI) is an interdepartmental investment plan aimed at improving the efficiency of public investment through evidence-based assessments and adjustments. It encompasses 26 measures focused on environmental sustainability, skills development, and innovation.
source_quote: The Grand plan d’investissement (GPI), which extends over 2018-22, is an interdepartmental investment plan under the authority of the Prime Minister that have mechanisms for adjusting investment decisions to increase its efficiency.

growth_orientation_rationale: Improving energy efficiency reduces energy demand and costs, contributing to economic growth and environmental sustainability.
status_evidence: The plan has allocated funding for energy efficiency improvements.
importance_rationale: This reform represents a significant investment in infrastructure aimed at enhancing energy efficiency, which is crucial for meeting climate targets and improving public sector performance.
description: The Grand plan d’investissement has earmarked EUR 9 billion to improve the energy efficiency of residential and public buildings over 2018-22, which includes existing measures to enhance energy performance.
source_quote: The Grand plan d’investissement has earmarked EUR 9 bn to improve the energy efficiency of residential and public buildings over 2018-22.

growth_orientation_rationale: The establishment of the Innovation Council is expected to enhance the coherence and effectiveness of innovation policies, thereby fostering a more conducive environment for innovation and economic growth.

importance_rationale: The creation of the Innovation Council represents a significant step towards improving the governance of innovation policies, which is crucial for enhancing the overall innovation landscape in France.

source_quote: The authorities introduced an Innovation Council in the summer of 2018 to provide guidance on innovation policies, including a review of existing measures with an objective of simplification.

source_quote: The recent increases in the ANR budget with the aim to increase success rates over 20% together with the plan to set up a multi-annual financial framework for research is welcome.

growth_orientation_rationale: The fund aims to enhance R&D investment and stimulate technological advancements, which are crucial for productivity and economic growth.

source_quote: Moreover, a specific investment fund for supporting radical technological innovation, the Innovation and Industry Fund (Fonds pour l’Innovation et l’Industrie, FII), was created in 2018.

growth_orientation_rationale: By simplifying governance, the reform enhances collaboration between research units and firms, potentially leading to increased innovation and commercialization of research outputs.

source_quote: The draft bill 'PACTE' widens the principle of a single entity in charge of the management mandate of the top research units (UMR).

source_quote: Boosting e-government as foreseen in the Grand plan d’investissement would also benefit from strengthening efforts to provide attractive career prospects for IT specialists.

source_quote: The 'Un jeune, une solution' plan initially provided 1.3 million 'solutions' targeted at young people under 26 years of age for a total of EUR 6.5 billion announced in July 2020.

growth_orientation_rationale: Investing in professional training enhances the skill set of the workforce, which is crucial for improving productivity and economic resilience.

source_quote: The law on research planning 2021-2030 and the fourth Investing for the Future Programme (PIA4, 2021-27) provide for work in this area by raising an annual public research effort of EUR 6 billion.

growth_orientation_rationale: This investment is expected to stimulate economic activity and job creation in green sectors, contributing to long-term sustainability and innovation.

growth_orientation_rationale: These loans incentivize small firms to adopt cleaner technologies, thereby promoting innovation and environmental sustainability.

source_quote: Green loans guaranteed by the State to small firms wishing to invest in cleaner technologies, infrastructures and processes (between EUR 50,000 and EUR 5,000,000 and up to 10 years), introduced in early 2021.

growth_orientation_rationale: Investing in digital infrastructure is expected to yield significant productivity gains, which can enhance overall economic performance.

source_quote: Further increasing public spending on training to develop the digital skills of low-qualified workers... will be a double-dividend policy, boosting productivity and lowering inequality.

source_quote: The panel calls for the establishment of a DMU, which would be an independent body and would be given the remit of using tools and frameworks that will support greater competition and consumer choice in digital markets.

growth_orientation_rationale: These initiatives aim to streamline regulations for innovative businesses, potentially enhancing their ability to bring new products to market and fostering economic growth.

growth_orientation_rationale: Enhancing public sector innovation can lead to improved service delivery and efficiency, ultimately benefiting economic productivity.

source_quote: An example of such an approach is the formation of the UK Policy Lab, which uses design, data and digital tools and acts as a testing ground for policy innovation across government.

source_quote: The United Kingdom is considering expanding the scope of the UK ETS in existing sectors, such as: calling for evidence on the inclusion of upstream oil and gas venting sectors, and to sectors currently not subject to an explicit carbon price.

growth_orientation_rationale: Encouraging innovative practices in agriculture can lead to more sustainable production methods, enhancing productivity and reducing emissions.

status_evidence: The government is reviewing agricultural support to tilt payments towards rewarding climate and ecosystem services.
importance_rationale: This reform represents a significant shift in agricultural policy towards sustainability and innovation, with potential long-term benefits for the sector.

source_quote: The government is reviewing agricultural support to increasingly tilt payments towards rewarding climate and ecosystem services and encouraging low-emitting production methods.

growth_orientation_rationale: This reform aims to enhance productivity and sustainability in agriculture, potentially leading to increased efficiency and reduced emissions.

importance_rationale: This reform represents a significant shift in how agricultural emissions are managed, integrating market mechanisms with R&D support.
description: The UK government is exploring a hybrid system for agricultural emissions that combines quantity-based measures with a carbon price, while also subsidizing improved practices and green R&D through competitive auction designs.
source_quote: A hybrid system, in which quantity-based measures are subject to a carbon price, while improved practices, the provision of nature-based services and green R&D are subsidised, preferably in competitive auction designs, would likely increase policy efficiency and should be explored.

growth_orientation_rationale: Investing in natural capital enhances ecosystem services and contributes to climate goals, which can lead to long-term economic benefits.

importance_rationale: This funding represents a significant investment in environmental sustainability and climate resilience, with potential long-term economic impacts.

source_quote: The England Trees Action Plan committed to more than doubling tree planting to 30 000 hectares per year, while the England Peat Action Plan sets out to restore 35 000 hectares of peatland by 2025.

growth_orientation_rationale: By improving investment conditions, the reform is expected to raise productivity and efficiency in the labor market, leading to economic growth.

source_quote: Given fiscal constraints, it is crucial to foster a conducive environment for business investment.

source_quote: The government could consider allowing the Bank to borrow capital through the issuance of government guaranteed bonds.

growth_orientation_rationale: Improving energy efficiency standards can lead to lower energy consumption and emissions, supporting the transition to a low-carbon economy.

source_quote: The government should reconsider and recommit to the minimum standard to band C with a concrete timeline to support the uprating of the overall housing stock.

growth_orientation_rationale: Enhancing domestic manufacturing capacity in technology is expected to raise productivity and innovation.
status_evidence: The project has been successfully implemented as of 1994.

source_quote: The Technology Reinvestment Project gave some $202 million toward flat-panel display research and development in October 1994.

growth_orientation_rationale: Improving education and vocational skills is expected to enhance the overall skill level of the workforce, thereby supporting economic growth.

source_quote: Goals 2000 seeks to improve the quality of the education system in a variety of ways, including the creation of 'voluntary' national standards for initial education and for vocational skills.

growth_orientation_rationale: The tax credit incentivizes private sector investment in R&D, which can lead to increased innovation and productivity.

source_quote: Research and experimentation (R&E) expenditures can be expensed and increases in R&E expenditures are subject to a tax credit of 20 per cent of qualified expenditures over a base amount.

growth_orientation_rationale: Facilitating connections between entrepreneurs and investors enhances the startup ecosystem, promoting innovation and economic growth.

source_quote: In setting up the ACE-Net, State Securities Administrators agreed to remove restrictions on inter-state trading of unregistered stocks of those companies which are on the ACE-Net.

growth_orientation_rationale: Funding for the application and commercialization of scientific discoveries directly supports innovation and economic growth.

growth_orientation_rationale: By providing broader tax deductions, this act encourages domestic production and export, fostering innovation and competitiveness.

growth_orientation_rationale: By improving the reliability of financial reporting, the reform aims to enhance investor confidence, which can lead to increased investment and economic growth.

source_quote: The Sarbanes-Oxley Act of 2002 created a new oversight body to supervise accountants, tightened the responsibility of corporate officers for financial reports and stiffened penalties.

growth_orientation_rationale: The tax credit encourages firms to increase their R&D spending, which can lead to greater innovation and productivity.

This tax credit incentivizes firms to invest in R&D activities by providing a tax reduction based on their research expenditures.
source_quote: The Research and Experimentation Tax Credit, usually referred to as the R&D tax credit, has since been extended 10 times, most recently in November 1999, and is currently scheduled to expire in June 2004.

growth_orientation_rationale: Improving energy infrastructure and reliability supports economic growth by ensuring a stable energy supply, which is crucial for productivity.

This comprehensive approach is designed to reduce reliance on foreign energy sources and strengthen the overall reliability of the energy supply.
source_quote: The Energy Policy Act of 2005 aims at improving the country’s electricity grid, expanding the diversity of energy supply and enhancing energy efficiency.

growth_orientation_rationale: Research on breakthrough technologies can lead to significant advancements in environmental sustainability and economic efficiency.

growth_orientation_rationale: By incentivizing the adoption of clean technologies, the policy aims to stimulate innovation and investment in the energy sector, which can lead to long-term economic benefits.

growth_orientation_rationale: By mandating the use of advanced bio-fuels, this reform aims to stimulate innovation in renewable energy technologies and reduce greenhouse gas emissions.

source_quote: The Renewable Fuels Standard was substantially revised in The Energy Independence and Security Act of 2007 to give increased weight to bio-fuels that are more effective in reducing GHG emissions.

description: The American Reinvestment and Recovery Act of 2009 significantly increased public funding for Research, Development, and Deployment (RD&D) to reduce greenhouse gas emissions, allocating approximately USD 26.7 billion, with a focus on energy efficiency and advanced energy technologies.
source_quote: The Administration gave a substantial boost to public funding for Research, Development and Deployment (RD&D) to reduce GHGemissions through the American Reinvestment and Recovery Act of2009.

source_quote: Cuts to employer social security contributions for hiring workers unemployed more than 60 days, with additional incentives if those workers remain employed a year later, as passed in the United States in March 2010.

growth_orientation_rationale: By improving the efficiency of healthcare delivery, this reform could lower costs and improve health outcomes, contributing to overall economic productivity.

source_quote: A potentially important measure in this regard is the creation of a Centre for Medicare and Medicaid Innovation within the Centres for Medicare and Medicaid Services to test provider-payment reforms.

source_quote: The Department of Energy’s (DOE’s) innovation budget ('science') is steadily rising.

growth_orientation_rationale: By improving educational standards and teacher effectiveness, the RTT programme aims to enhance the skills of the workforce, which is crucial for economic growth.

source_quote: The RTT programme encourages US states to change their aspirations and organisational culture by adopting internationally benchmarked state-developed standards and assessments.

source_quote: The government plans to double investment in basic research over the next five years.

growth_orientation_rationale: Redirecting funds from fossil-fuel subsidies to energy RD&D is expected to enhance innovation in clean technologies, supporting long-term economic growth.

description: The Administration proposed to eliminate most fossil-fuel subsidies, redirecting funds towards energy research and development.

source_quote: Passed in 2011, the America Invents Act aims to increase patent quality by providing for new procedures for challenging patent validity.

source_quote: In June 2011 the President announced the Advanced Manufacturing Partnership to focus approximately USD 500 million of existing programme funds on improving manufacturing performance.

growth_orientation_rationale: By enhancing the efficiency and quality of the patent system, the Act is expected to stimulate innovation and investment in new technologies.

source_quote: The Administration’s new National Network for Manufacturing Innovation (NNMI) is to be structured very much along these lines.

description: Education reform is needed to strengthen achievement and address lagging tertiary attainment in STEM fields.
source_quote: Education reform is needed to strengthen achievement and to address lagging tertiary attainment in the fields of science, technology, engineering and mathematics (STEM).

growth_orientation_rationale: Increased funding for basic research agencies is expected to enhance innovation capacity and technological advancements, contributing positively to economic growth.
status_evidence: The proposal to appropriate the funds was mentioned as preferable for enhancing R&D productivity.
importance_rationale: This reform represents a significant commitment to enhancing the funding landscape for basic research, which is crucial for long-term innovation and economic growth.
description: The proposal to appropriate funds approved in the 2007 America COMPETES Act aims to double the funding of key basic research agencies, enhancing the stability and productivity of R&D funding in the United States.
source_quote: It would be preferable to cut non-R&D expenditures... by appropriating the funds approved in the 2007 America COMPETES Act, which called for doubling the funding of three key basic research agencies.

growth_orientation_rationale: A national innovation office would streamline efforts and resources towards innovation, potentially leading to increased productivity and economic growth.
status_evidence: The recommendation to establish a national innovation office was included in the proposals for strengthening innovation.
importance_rationale: While significant, the establishment of an office is a structural change that supports existing innovation efforts rather than a direct funding or policy overhaul.
description: The establishment of a national innovation office is proposed to enhance coherence and continuity in the implementation of the national innovation strategy.
source_quote: Establish a national innovation office to increase coherence and continuity in implementation of the national innovation strategy.

growth_orientation_rationale: Enhancing the effectiveness of the SBIR programme can lead to better outcomes for firms, fostering innovation and economic growth.
status_evidence: The need for continuous evaluation of the SBIR programme has been highlighted.
importance_rationale: The recommendation for continuous evaluation represents a significant step towards improving an existing programme that supports innovation.
description: The SBIR programme is recommended for continuous evaluation to assess its economic impact and improve performance, emphasizing the need for better project management and tracking of award winners.
source_quote: All of these studies concur on the need for a continuous effort to carefully evaluate the SBIR programme to assess its real economic impact.

growth_orientation_rationale: By aligning R&D programmes with modern innovation practices, the potential for increased productivity and economic growth is enhanced.
status_evidence: Federal R&D support programmes should recognize the changing nature of innovation and adapt accordingly.
importance_rationale: This reform addresses the need for federal programmes to evolve, which is crucial for maintaining competitiveness in a rapidly changing innovation landscape.
description: Federal R&D support programmes are urged to adapt to the changing nature of innovation, including open innovation and service sector innovation, to better support economic growth.
source_quote: Federal R&D support programmes should recognize the changing nature of innovation and adapt accordingly.

growth_orientation_rationale: Improving STEM education is expected to enhance the quality of the workforce, thereby supporting innovation and economic growth.
status_evidence: The policy actions have been publicly announced but not yet implemented.
importance_rationale: The initiative to prepare more STEM-qualified teachers represents a significant but narrower reform in education policy.
description: The US is taking policy actions to improve quality secondary education, including supporting state-led standards for secondary education and preparing 100,000 more STEM-qualified teachers over the next decade, based on the recommendations of the President’s Council of Advisors on Science and Technology (PCAST) 2010 report.
source_quote: The US is taking policy actions to improve quality secondary education, based on the recommendations of the President’s Council of Advisors on Science and Technology.

growth_orientation_rationale: Enhancing STEM education increases the supply of skilled workers, which is essential for innovation and economic growth.
status_evidence: The 2017 budget proposal includes $4 billion in mandatory funding for States to increase access to K-12 STEM coursework.
importance_rationale: This initiative represents a significant investment in human capital, targeting the critical area of STEM education to enhance the workforce's skills and capabilities.
description: The United States is taking policy action to improve quality secondary education, based on a 5-year strategic plan for enhancing STEM education, including supporting state-led standards and investing to prepare more STEM-qualified teachers.
source_quote: The 2017 budget proposal includes $4 billion in mandatory funding over three years for States to increase access to K-12 STEM coursework.

growth_orientation_rationale: Stable funding for R&D is essential for fostering innovation and enhancing productivity in the economy.
status_evidence: The recommendation emphasizes the need to protect the R&D budget from cuts.
importance_rationale: Protecting the R&D budget is a significant step towards ensuring continued investment in innovation, which is crucial for long-term economic growth.
description: The federal R&D budget should be protected from expenditure cuts, ensuring stable funding for research and development activities.
source_quote: The federal R&D budget should be protected from the expenditure cuts.

growth_orientation_rationale: Investing in low-carbon technologies can lead to sustainable economic growth by fostering innovation and reducing environmental impact.
status_evidence: The 21st Century Clean Transportation System would fund low-carbon technology and infrastructure.
importance_rationale: This initiative is significant as it targets innovation in a critical sector, aiming to address climate change while promoting economic development.
description: The 21st Century Clean Transportation System aims to fund low-carbon technology and infrastructure, promoting innovation in energy-saving and low-carbon technologies.
source_quote: The 21st Century Clean Transportation System would fund low-carbon technology and infrastructure.

growth_orientation_rationale: While the patent box could incentivize innovation by reducing tax burdens on patent income, it may also complicate the tax system and disproportionately benefit established firms.
status_evidence: A number of proposals to support R&D further has included calls to establish a so-called patent box.
importance_rationale: The proposal for a patent box represents a significant shift in tax policy aimed at enhancing innovation, though it has not yet been implemented.
description: Proposals to establish a patent box regime have been discussed, which would lower the tax rate on income from patents and intellectual property to enhance competitiveness.
source_quote: A number of proposals to support R&D further has included calls to establish a so-called patent box.

growth_orientation_rationale: Shifting R&D funding to the private sector can enhance innovation and productivity by leveraging private investment in research.
status_evidence: Government support for business R&D has been noted to be around one-sixth of total business R&D.
importance_rationale: The shift in funding represents a significant change in the landscape of R&D financing, impacting how innovation is pursued in the economy.
description: The text discusses the shift in R&D spending from government to the business sector, indicating a significant policy change in how research and development is funded in the United States.
source_quote: Spending has been shifting from government to the business sector – especially since the financial crisis.

growth_orientation_rationale: By making R&D tax credits refundable, new firms can better invest in innovation, leading to increased productivity and economic growth.
component_name: Refundable R&D Tax Credits for New Firms
status_evidence: The proposal to make R&D tax credits refundable for new firms was included in the key recommendations.
importance_rationale: This reform is significant as it targets new firms, which are crucial for innovation and economic dynamism, but it does not represent a complete overhaul of the tax system.
description: The federal government has proposed to make R&D tax credits refundable for new firms, which would enhance their access to funding for innovation activities.
source_quote: Make R&D tax credits refundable for new firms.

growth_orientation_rationale: Faster patenting processes can encourage innovation by allowing inventors to secure their intellectual property more quickly, thus facilitating commercialization.
status_evidence: The recommendation to continue speeding up patenting decisions was highlighted in the key recommendations.
importance_rationale: This reform is important as it addresses a critical bottleneck in the innovation process, but it does not constitute a fundamental change in patent law.
description: The federal government aims to speed up patenting decisions in line with targets, which is expected to enhance the innovation landscape by reducing time delays in securing patents.
source_quote: Continue to speed up patenting decisions in line with targets without compromising patent quality.

growth_orientation_rationale: Improving broadband access enhances productivity and employment opportunities by facilitating job searches and access to information.
status_evidence: The FCC has established the Connect America Fund to address broadband access issues.
importance_rationale: This initiative addresses a significant infrastructure gap that can lead to improved economic outcomes, particularly in underserved areas.
description: The Federal Communications Commission established the Connect America Fund to improve broadband access in under-supplied areas, particularly in rural regions.
source_quote: The Federal Communications Commission has established a Connect America Fund to address provision in areas that are currently under-supplied.

growth_orientation_rationale: Enhancing access to credit can stimulate entrepreneurship and innovation.
status_evidence: The reform is currently in the exploratory phase.
importance_rationale: This reform is exploratory and does not represent a significant policy change.
description: The U.S. is exploring regulatory experimentation for new financial technology initiatives, which may enhance access to credit for traditionally underserved groups.
source_quote: Regulators will need to find ways to ensure a level playing field between traditional financial institutions and the new entrants.

growth_orientation_rationale: Increased public investment in innovation and skills can enhance economic growth and productivity.
status_evidence: The plans have been publicly announced but not yet implemented.
importance_rationale: While significant, this reform is part of broader investment plans rather than a standalone major reform.
description: Plans have been announced to boost public investment spending in areas such as infrastructure, skills, innovation, health, and environmental protection.
source_quote: Plans have been announced to boost public investment spending with long-term benefits: infrastructure, skills, innovation, health and environmental protection.

growth_orientation_rationale: A coherent national innovation strategy can streamline efforts and improve outcomes in innovation.
status_evidence: The national innovation office has been established and is operational.
importance_rationale: The creation of a national office represents a significant structural change in innovation governance.
description: The establishment of a national innovation office aims to enhance coherence and continuity in the implementation of the national innovation strategy.
source_quote: The President has signed a Presidential Memorandum establishing a White House Office on American Innovation.

growth_orientation_rationale: While the reform aims to normalize housing finance, it may create financial pressures that could hinder investment in GSEs.
status_evidence: The reform has been publicly announced but not yet implemented.
importance_rationale: This reform represents a significant change in the regulatory framework for GSEs.
description: The tax reform enacted in late-2017 is expected to put government-sponsored enterprises (GSEs) under financial pressure due to a reduction in the corporate tax rate, which will trigger a large write-down on their tax-deferred assets. The reform aims to normalize housing finance by recommending the privatization of GSEs and subjecting them to the same regulations as other mortgage-backed securities issuers.
source_quote: The last Economic Survey recommended leaving the securitisation of mortgages to the private sector.

growth_orientation_rationale: Improving broadband access enhances connectivity, which is essential for innovation and economic growth.
status_evidence: The fund is actively operating and allocating subsidies.
importance_rationale: This initiative represents a major investment in infrastructure critical for supporting innovation and economic development.
description: The Federal Communications Commission (FCC) operates the Connect America Fund to improve broadband provision for all Americans, particularly in rural areas, using reverse auctions to allocate subsidies for expanding coverage.
source_quote: The FCC operates the Connect America Fund to improve broadband provision for all Americans including in rural areas at reasonably comparable prices.
